String.Source: Remove all furniture from entryway and remodel it to match the main hall.
String.Dest: 移除玄关的所有家具，将之改造和主厅相匹配。

String.Source: I'm a bit short of money right now. (<Global=BYOHHPCost> gold)
String.Dest: 我现在钱有些不够。(<Global=BYOHHPCost>金币)

String.Source: I'll have to think about it.
Visit your new property in <Alias=Hold> hold
Can I just cut the lumber myself?
I'd like to buy some lumber.
Is that land you mentioned still available?
I got your letter about the land for sale. Is it still available?
String.Dest: 我收到了你的信，说有土地在出售。现在还有吗？

String.Source: I'd like to purchase a house.
I'd be honored to have you as my steward.
String.Dest: 你来做我的管家是我的荣幸。

String.Source: I'd like you to make some improvements to the house.
String.Dest: 我想让你帮忙给房子做些改进。

String.Source: A large addition in the Riften style.
String.Dest: 裂谷城风格的大扩展部分。

String.Source: A large addition in the Whiterun style.
String.Dest: 白漫城风格的大扩建部分。

String.Source: I need a steward for my house. Are you interested?
String.Dest: 我的宅邸需要一位管家。你有兴趣吗？

String.Source: A large addition in the Solitude style.
String.Dest: 独孤城风格的大扩建部分。
一个整洁的单间小房屋。

String.Source: I'll have to think about it.
Use the Drafting Table to begin building your house
String.Dest: 使用设计桌开始建造你的房子

String.Source: Place a workbench in your house for crafting furniture.
String.Dest: 在你的房子里放置一个工作台来制作家具。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Kitchen.
String.Dest: 在厨房里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: I got your letter about the land for sale. Is it still available?
String.Dest: 我收到了你的信，说有土地在出售。现在还有吗？
行啊，你想买什么都行。1000金币怎么样？

String.Source: Actually, maybe this isn't the best time...
String.Dest: 其实，现在可能不是时候……

String.Source: How do you like the farm?
Yes, I've got a house in Falkreath.
String.Dest: 没错，我在佛克瑞斯有所房子。
你能再说一遍你的故事吗？

String.Source: Visit your new property in <Alias=Hold> hold
Sorry, no, I've changed my mind.
String.Dest: 对不起，不了，我改主意了。

String.Source: Remove the workbench from the Kitchen.
Proudspire Manor, my house in Solitude.
String.Dest: 豪塔别墅，我在独孤城的房子。

String.Source: Vlindrel Hall, my house in Markarth.
String.Dest: 林德尔会堂，我在马卡斯的房子。

String.Source: Windstad Manor, my house in Hjaalmarch.
String.Dest: 风城庄园，我在希雅陲的房子。

String.Source: Do you know where I can buy materials like glass or straw?
String.Dest: 你知道我去哪里能买到玻璃或稻草之类的吗？

String.Source: I'll have to think about it.
Add a tower ready to be turned into a comfortable library.
String.Dest: 添加一个舒适的藏书楼。

String.Source: Use the Carpenter's Workbench to build the foundation of your house
String.Dest: 用木工台建造房子的地基

String.Source: A stone platform suitable for placing shrines to the Divines of your choice.
String.Dest: 一个适合放置你所信仰的圣灵的祭坛的石制台座。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Library.
String.Dest: 在藏书楼里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: Remove the workbench from the Trophy Room.
String.Dest: 移除战利品室里的工作台。

String.Source: I'm a bit short of money right now. (<Global=BYOHHPCost> gold)
String.Dest: 我现在钱有些不够。(<Global=BYOHHPCost>金币)
想了想咱们还是住在这儿吧。

String.Source: Add a kitchen that can be fitted out with cooking stations, food containers and the like.
String.Dest: 添加一个厨房，可以配备烹饪台、食物容器等。

String.Source: Add a greenhouse with customizable planters.
String.Dest: 添加一个温室，用来种植想要的植物。

String.Source: At my house in the Pale.
A Grand Soul gem filled with a Grand Soul is required to build the Arcane Enchanter.
String.Dest: 建造奥术附魔台需要一个充满的特大灵魂石。

String.Source: Is that land you mentioned still available?
Could I adopt one of your children?
String.Dest: 我能领养你这里的孩子吗？

String.Source: Use the Carpenter's Workbench to build the foundation of your house
String.Dest: 用木工台建造房子的地基

String.Source: We could live in my house in Hjaalmarch.
String.Dest: 我们可以住我在希雅陲的房子。

String.Source: I'd like you to buy some building materials for me.
String.Dest: 我想让你帮我买些建材。

String.Source: Add a storage area which can be equipped with a variety of containers and weapon racks. Includes an exterior porch.
String.Dest: 添加一个储藏区域，可以配备各种容器和武器架。附带一个户外平台。

String.Source: Remove the workbench from the Alchemy Laboratory.
String.Dest: 移除炼金实验室里的工作台。

String.Source: How about my house in Falkreath?
String.Dest: 我在佛克瑞斯的房子怎么样？

String.Source: Replace my Enchanting Lab with a Child's Room. (<Global=HDRiftenChildRoom> gold)
String.Dest: 把我的附魔实验室换成儿童房。(<Global=HDRiftenChildRoom>金币)
孤儿院，通用的，没有看护

String.Source: Replace my Alchemy Lab with a Child's Room. (<Global=HDWhiterunChildRoom> gold)
String.Dest: 把我的炼金实验室换成儿童房。(<Global=HDWhiterunChildRoom>金币)

String.Source: Lakeview Manor, my house in Falkreath.
String.Dest: 湖景庄园，我在佛克瑞斯的房子。

String.Source: Yes, I've got a house in the Pale.
String.Dest: 没错，我在苍原有所房子。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Armory.
String.Dest: 在军械库里添加一个工作台。

String.Dest: 移除小房子里的工作台。

String.Source: I have a house, but not room for you.

String.Source: Yes, I've got a house in Whiterun.
String.Dest: 没错，我在白漫城有所房子。
微风阁，我在白漫城的房子。

String.Source: What have you got for sale?

String.Source: Add a tower ready to be fitted out as an alchemy laboratory.
String.Dest: 添加一个塔楼，用做炼金实验室。

String.Source: Yes, I've got a house in Hjaalmarch.
String.Dest: 没错，我在希雅陲有所房子。

String.Dest: 如果你愿意，我可以收养你。

Visit your new property in <Alias=Hold> hold
Who are you? Where are your parents?

String.Dest: 在地窖里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: Add a residential wing with master bedroom and childrens' bedroom. Includes an exterior porch.
String.Dest: 添加一个带有主卧室和儿童房的居住区。附带一个户外平台。

String.Source: Use the Drafting Table to begin building your house
String.Dest: 使用设计桌开始建造你的房子

String.Source: You can adopt up to two children, if you own a home with room for them to stay in.
String.Dest: 你最多可以收养两个孩子，前提是你有房子供他们居住。

String.Source: Speak with Constance Michel about Adoption
String.Dest: 与康斯坦斯·米切尔谈谈收养事宜

String.Dest: 我想把我的儿童房换成附魔实验室。(<Global=HDRiftenEnchanting>金币)

String.Source: Who are you? Where are your parents?
Lakeview Manor, my house in Falkreath.
String.Dest: 湖景庄园，我在佛克瑞斯的房子。

String.Dest: 把我的儿童房换成炼金实验室。(<Global=HDWhiterunAlchemy>金币)
甜蜜湾，我在裂谷的房子。

String.Dest: 移除军械库里的工作台。

String.Source: Friends of the Jarls in Falkreath, Hjaalmarch and the Pale may buy land in those holds and build their own home on it.
String.Dest: 佛克瑞斯、希雅陲和苍原领主的朋友可以在这些领购买土地，并建造属于自己的家。

String.Source: Heljarchen Hall, my house in the Pale.
String.Dest: 赫雅根庄园，我在苍原领的房子。

String.Source: Yes, I've got a house in Markarth.
String.Dest: 没错，我在马卡斯城有所房子。

String.Source: Remove the workbench from the Cellar.
Add a cellar beneath the Main Hall.

String.Source: Buy lumber for building your house

String.Dest: 使用设计桌开始建造你的房子

String.Source: I have a house in the Pale.
Add a trophy room that can be equipped with display cases, animal trophies, and weapon racks.

Yes, I've got a big house in Solitude.
String.Dest: 没错，我在独孤城有所大房子。

String.Dest: 在卧室里放置一个工作台。

What do I need to do?
Remove the workbench from the Enchanter's Tower.
String.Dest: 移除附魔师塔里的工作台。

String.Source: Add a room that can be equipped with smithing stations and weapon storage. Includes an exterior porch.
String.Dest: 添加一个房间，用于锻造和武器存储。附带一个户外平台。

String.Source: Place workbenches in the Main Hall for crafting furniture.
String.Dest: 在主厅里放置一个工作台来制作家具。

String.Dest: 移除藏书楼里的工作台。

String.Dest: 风城庄园，我在希雅陲的房子。

Remove the workbench from the Bedrooms.
Yes, I've got a house in Riften.
String.Dest: 没错，我在裂谷城有所房子。

String.Dest: 在战利品室里放置一个工作台。
附底座的雪地剑齿虎头

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Alchemy Laboratory.
String.Dest: 在炼金实验室里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the entryway for crafting furniture.
String.Dest: 在入口放置一个工作台，用于制作家具。

String.Source: I'd like you to buy furnishings for the house.
String.Dest: 我想让你为房子买些家具。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Greenhouse.
String.Dest: 在温室里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: Place a workbench in the Storage Room.
String.Dest: 在储藏室里放置一个工作台。

String.Source: Yes, I've got a big house in Windhelm.
String.Dest: 没错，我在风舵城有所大房子。

String.Source: Location for things that need a location
String.Dest: Location for things that need a location

String.Source: Replace my Child's Room with an Alchemy Lab. (<Global=HDMarkarthAlchemy> gold)
String.Dest: 把我的儿童房换成炼金实验室。(<Global=HDMarkarthAlchemy>金币)

String.Source: I'd like to purchase a house.
I've purchased a home and furnished it. Can I adopt a child now?
String.Dest: 我已经买了房子，而且装修完毕。我现在能领养孩子了吗？

String.Source: Sorry, I can't afford it right now.
String.Dest: 对不起，我现在负担不起。

String.Source: I... hadn't thought of that. I own a house, but I don't have a room for them.
String.Dest: 我……还没想过。我有房子，却没有给他们住的房间。
行啊，你想买什么都行。1000金币怎么样？

String.Source: Sure. When I don't need him, he can stay with you.
String.Dest: 当然。我不需要他的时候，可以让他陪着你。

String.Source: You can find, make, or buy a variety of gifts for your children, including toys, clothing, and sweets.
String.Dest: 你可以为自己的孩子寻找、制作或购买各种各样的礼物，包括玩具、衣服还有点心。
我收到了您的信。我就是<Alias=Player>。

String.Source: Where can I learn more about magic?
String.Dest: 从哪里能学到更多魔法？

String.Source: I'm a bit short of money right now. (<Global=BYOHHPCost> gold)
String.Dest: 我现在钱有些不够。(<Global=BYOHHPCost>金币)

String.Source: No. Now get it out of here.
String.Dest: 不行。现在就把它弄出去。
我收到了您的信。我就是<Alias=Player>。

String.Source: Give me everything you're carrying, dog.
String.Dest: 狗，把你带的所有东西给我。

String.Source: It's time for us to move.
I got your letter about the land for sale. Is it still available?
String.Dest: 我收到了你的信，说有土地在出售。现在还有吗？

String.Source: My house in Markarth would be perfect.
String.Dest: 我在马卡斯的房子会很完美。

String.Source: Do you have any work you need done?
Speak to the Jarl of Falkreath
String.Dest: 与佛克瑞斯的领主交谈

String.Source: Is that land you mentioned still available?
I'd like to purchase a house.

String.Dest: 甜蜜湾，我在裂谷的房子。
绝对不行。不许养宠物。永远不许。

String.Source: If you would like to adopt an orphan from the Orphanage, speak to Constance Michel.
String.Dest: 如果你想收养孤儿院的孩子，请和康斯坦斯·米切尔谈谈。

String.Source: All right. But you're responsible for him.
String.Dest: 好吧。但是你要对他负责哦。
不。不许养宠物。永远不许。

String.Source: I'll have to think about it.
Your old place would suit us just fine.
String.Dest: 你的旧宅很适合咱们的。

String.Source: Here's your money. She'd better be safe. (Give <Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom> gold)
String.Dest: 钱在这里。放她安全。(交付<Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom>金币)

String.Source: Cut it out, both of you.
I don't have the money. Can't you just let him go?
String.Dest: 我没有钱，你们能放了他吗？

String.Source: I don't need your services any more.
Read the bandit's ransom note for <Alias=Spouse>
String.Dest: 阅读强盗送来的<Alias=Spouse>绑架信

String.Source: How about you just let her go and nobody has to get hurt? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 不如你放了她，也没有人会因此受伤，如何？（说服）

String.Source: What did you do to my husband?
What did you do to my wife?
I'd like to make a request.
I'd like you to play a different instrument.
String.Dest: 你能不能换个乐器演奏。

String.Source: I've changed my mind. I'd like you to stay.
String.Dest: 我改主意了。我希望你留下来。

String.Source: I don't have the money. Can't you just let her go?
String.Dest: 我没有钱，你们能放了她吗？

String.Source: How about you just let him go and nobody has to get hurt? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 不如你放了他，也没有人会因此受伤，如何？（说服）

String.Source: Here's your money. He'd better be safe. (Give <Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom> gold)
String.Dest: 钱在这里。放他安全。(交付<Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom>金币)

String.Source: Money's not going to do you much good after I've killed you.
String.Dest: 等我杀了你，钱对你也就没用了。
我已经听够了。你可以死了。

String.Source: Not yet. I'll be back for you.
String.Dest: 再等等。我会回来找你的。

String.Source: Speak to the Steward of Falkreath about the land for sale
String.Dest: 与佛克瑞斯的总管谈谈在售的土地

String.Source: Speak to the Steward of Morthal about the land for sale
String.Dest: 与莫萨尔的总管谈谈在售的土地

String.Source: Speak to the Jarl of Dawnstar about the land for sale
String.Dest: 与晨星的领主谈谈在售的土地

String.Source: Is that land you mentioned still available?
I got your letter about the land for sale. Is it still available?
String.Dest: 我收到了你的信，说有土地在出售。现在还有吗？
吸血鬼之血已得到休息
吸血鬼之血已得到休息

String.Source: Is that land you mentioned still available?
I got your letter about the land for sale. Is it still available?
String.Dest: 我收到了你的信，说有土地在出售。现在还有吗？

String.Source: I... hadn't thought of that. I own a house, but I don't have a room for them.
String.Dest: 我……还没想过。我有房子，却没有给他们住的房间。

String.Source: We could live in Tundra Homestead.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在苔原宅邸。
我们可以住在无量塔楼。

String.Source: We could live in Shadowfoot Sanctum.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在影足密室。

String.Source: We could live in Dead Man's Dread.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在亡者之惧。
我们可以住在亨德拉海姆。

String.Source: We could live in Gallows Hall.
We could live in Goldenhills Plantation.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在金丘农园。

String.Source: We could live in Bloodchill Manor.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在血寒庄园。
我们可以住在尼楚瑟姆兹。

String.Source: I'd like to decorate my home.
Visit Vlindrel Hall, your new house
String.Dest: 前往你的新房——林德尔会堂

String.Source: Visit Proudspire Manor, your new house
String.Dest: 前往你的新房——豪塔别墅

String.Source: You're out in the middle of nowhere, aren't you?
String.Dest: 你怎么会在这荒无人烟的地方？

String.Source: It's time for us to part ways.

String.Dest: 好啊，抓人听起来挺有意思的。

String.Source: Living with you would be perfect.
String.Dest: 和你住在一起真是太完美了。

String.Source: How about my house in Windhelm?
String.Dest: 我在风舵的房子怎么样？

String.Source: I'd like to decorate my home.
I'd like to decorate my home.
I'd like us to move somewhere else.
Proudspire Manor, my house in Solitude.
String.Dest: 豪塔别墅，我在独孤城的房子。

String.Source: Let's live in my house in Solitude.
String.Dest: 那咱们就住我在独孤城的房子吧。

String.Source: I have a house in Riften.
I'd like to decorate my home.

String.Dest: 霜斋，我在风舵城的房子。

String.Source: Follow me. I need your help.
String.Dest: 跟我来。我需要你的帮助。

String.Source: You need to stop bullying Lars Battle-Born.
String.Dest: 你不能再欺负拉斯·战狂了。

String.Source: You're awfully... mature for your age.

String.Dest: 微风阁，我在白漫城的房子。

String.Source: Do you have any more work?
I need you to do something.
I'd like to decorate my home.
We could live in my house in Whiterun.
String.Dest: 我们可以住在我在白漫城的房子里。

String.Source: Actually, I can't stop to play games right now.
String.Dest: 其实，我现在没时间停下玩游戏。

String.Source: Vlindrel Hall, my house in Markarth.
String.Dest: 林德尔会堂，我在马卡斯的房子。

String.Source: I'd like to decorate my home.

String.Dest: 好啊，抓人听起来挺有意思的。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
As a mark of the high esteem in which you are held by Jarl <Alias=Jarl>, <Alias.Pronoun=Jarl> has instructed me to offer you an opportunity to become a landowner in <Alias=Hold>. A choice piece of undeveloped land in the hold has just become available. Please contact me if you are interested in purchasing it.
Your humble servant, etc., etc.,
<Alias=Steward>, Steward to Jarl <Alias=Jarl> of <Alias=HoldCity>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
作为你被<Alias=Jarl>领主高度尊重的标志，<Alias.Pronoun=Jarl>指示我给你一个机会，成为<Alias=Hold>的地主。领内有一块精选的未开发土地刚刚空置出来。如果有兴趣，请与我联系。
你谦卑的仆人，
<Alias=HoldCity>领主<Alias=Jarl>的总管，<Alias=Steward>

String.Source: You awaken feeling a Father's Love.
String.Dest: 你在醒来时感受到了身为父亲之爱。

String.Source:
WANTED ~ A Good Home ~

In these days of war and strife, the orphans of Skyrim are the true victims. Many have no one left to turn to, and face a life of hard labor, poverty, and misery. If you could provide a stable home for one of these innocent children, please, consider adoption. Whether you choose to adopt from us, or to take in someone closer to home, you can make a difference in a child's life. For more information, enquire with: Constance Michel Honorhall Orphanage, Riften
String.Dest:
想要 ~ 一个美好的家~

在这充满战争和冲突的日子里，天际的孤儿们才是真正的受害者。他们面临着艰苦繁重的劳动，和贫穷痛苦的生活。 如果您能给这些无辜的孩子提供一个稳定的家，还请考虑领养。无论您是选择从我们这里、还是离您家更近的地方领养，您都可以改变一个孩子的人生。 想了解更多信息，请咨询 裂谷城，荣耀堂孤儿院 康斯坦斯·米切尔

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> <Alias=Player>,
After a careful review of the building plans for <Alias=Home>, your house in <Alias=HomeCity>, I can offer you an additional option for furnishing your home: if you wish, you can now purchase a children's bedroom set. I have arranged to update your Home Decorating Guide accordingly.
As always, please speak with me if you would like to purchase this or any other furnishings for your house.
Sincerely, <Alias=HomeCitySteward> Steward of <Alias=HomeCity> </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> <Alias=Player>,
在仔细审查了你在<Alias=HomeCity>的房子，<Alias=Home>的建筑计划之后，我可以为你提供一个额外的家装选择。如果你愿意，现在可以购买儿童房了。我已经安排更新了你的家装指南。
一如既往，当你需要购买本家装或者其他任何家具时，都可以与我联系。
此致 <Alias=HomeCity>总管 <Alias=HomeCitySteward> </font>

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
As a mark of the high esteem in which you are held by me and my people, I would like to offer you an opportunity to become a landowner in <Alias=Hold>. A choice piece of undeveloped land in the hold has just become available. Please contact me if you are interested in purchasing it.
I remain,
Jarl <Alias=Jarl> of <Alias=HoldCity>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
为了表达我与我之人民对你的高度尊重，我打算给你一个机会，让你成为<Alias=Hold>的地主。领中恰好有一块精选的未开发土地刚刚空置出来。如有兴趣，请与我联系。
此致
<Alias=HoldCity>领主<Alias=Jarl>

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Beginner's Guide to Homesteading

[pagebreak]

If you're like most people, you've always dreamed of owning your own steading and building your own home. But where to start? Never fear, you hold in your hands the guide to everything you need to know. Before long, you'll be gazing complacently across your well-tended lands from the porch of your own manor house. [pagebreak] Getting Started There are two vital pieces of equipment that the prospective homeowner needs: the Drafting Table and the Carpenter's Workbench. Your Drafting Table is where you'll lay out the plans for each stage of your new house. Don't worry about making a mistake here - you can always change your mind, and making a new plan costs you nothing. Remember: measure twice and cut once. Your Carpenter's Workbench is where you'll do the actual construction. Once you've settled on a plan at the Drafting Table, you can start building your house at the Carpenter's Workbench. Avoid the common beginner's mistake - don't try to build the roof without building the proper supports first! Space for the Family If you have a spouse or children, you'll certainly want to get the house in a livable state as soon as possible. Your loving spouse will no doubt make do with nothing more than a roof over her head and a bed to sleep in, but what about the children? Don't worry - all they need is a bed and a chest or dresser to store their treasures, and they will be perfectly content. Building Materials You will need a lot of supplies to complete your house, but it isn't necessary to gather everything you need ahead of time. Unless you're in a hurry, you can just build in stages as materials become available. You'll enjoy watching your home progress from dream to reality. The most common materials you'll need are sawn logs, cut stone, and clay. Luckily, these are plentiful in Skyrim - in fact, most building sites will have one or more easily accessible sources of clay and stone. For sawn lumber, any lumber mill owner will be glad to sell and deliver as much as you need. You'll need a lot of nails - fortunately even a novice blacksmith will soon find themselves turning iron into nails with ease. When you turn to furnishing your completed house, you'll need a much wider variety of materials. Some of them, such as straw and glass, are commonly obtained from general goods stores. For the rest - the whole of Skyrim will become your general store! Hiring a Steward Once your estate is well-established, you may wish to consider hiring a steward to help manage your affairs. A good steward can be invaluable - from hiring a carriage driver to buying a cow to keeping you supplied with building materials - freeing you to enjoy the fruits of your labors. Before hiring a steward, it's advisable to bring a potential candidate to your manor and observe whether they are a good fit for your requirements. Remember, you are putting your entire estate into their hands - you need someone you can trust implicitly. Building Your House The rest of this guide will review plans for each room that you might want to build. [pagebreak] [pagebreak] Small House Before you get too ambitious, gain confidence by building this tidy cottage. It is the perfect starter home, and might turn out to be all you need. But don't worry - if you decide to keep building, you can remodel this into an entry way to the rest of your house. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] Main Hall You may decide the Small House is not enough - perhaps you need room for a growing family? The next step is to add a Main Hall, which will turn your cottage into an imposing manor house: two floors, including space for two small bedrooms, a back room and a large dining area. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] Additions Once you've built a Main Hall, your options become almost unlimited - you now have room to add three more additional wings, if you decide you still need more space. For each wing, you have three choices of what to build, giving a total of nine possible additions! (But remember - you can only build three of them, so choose wisely.) [pagebreak] West Wing - Bedrooms The Bedroom addition is perfect if you have a family who needs more comfortable living quarters than the Main Hall affords. The Bedroom has space for a master bedroom plus two children's beds, as well as all the dressers, wardrobes, etc. that anyone could desire. This addition also includes a spacious exterior porch. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] West Wing - Greenhouse Perhaps you are a gardener at heart? If so, the Greenhouse provides room for planters where you can grow almost whatever you wish, sheltered from Skyrim's harsh climate. Tend and harvest your crops from the comfort of your own home! [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] West Wing - Enchanter's Tower If your interests lie in the magical realm, this tower addition is for you. Conduct your research in privacy and comfort. Plenty of space for keeping your collections and artifacts organized. And the view from the tower is guaranteed to take your breath away. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] North Wing - Storage Room If you simply need more space to store your many possessions and collections, build yourself a Storage Room. The included porch can even be connected to the porch on the East or West wings, if you build the Bedroom or Armory additions. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] North Wing - Trophy Room Are you a big game hunter who wants to show off your prizes? The Trophy Room provides space for displaying up to seven magnificent mounted specimens of your choice, sure to amaze and impress your guests. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] North Wing - Alchemy Laboratory Perfect for the aspiring alchemist, this tower addition will give you plenty of space and storage to hone your craft in comfort. And when you need a break from brewing potions, enjoy the view from the tower roof. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] East Wing - Armory If you like nothing better than to spend a day hammering metal, or are simply a collector of armor and weapons, the Armory is for you. With space for smithing, as well as plenty of room to display your martial collections in style, the Armory is the perfect addition to any house. [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] East Wing - Kitchen The Kitchen provides everything you need to pursue the highest culinary arts. Tired of cooking everything in a pot over a fire? You can even equip it with a new-fangled oven! [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] East Wing - Library The Library tower is sure to please those who value literature. With space for all the bookshelves you could desire, you'll be able to enjoy your collection of books in style. Or perhaps take a book to the tower roof and enjoy the view of your steading? [pagebreak]
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

初学者建房指南

[pagebreak]

如果你和大多数人一样，一直梦想拥有自己的庄园，建造自己的家。可该从哪里开始呢?不要怕，你手里的这本指南有你想知道的一切。用不了多久，你就会从自己庄园的户外平台上，得意洋洋地望着你精心打造的土地。 [pagebreak] 开始准备 身为准房主，两个设备至关重要——设计桌和木工台。 设计桌可以让你为新房的各阶段制定计划。不用担心犯错，你可以随时改变计划，制定新的计划不需要付出任何代价。切记：反复丈量，一次成型。 木工台是你进行实际施工的地方。一旦你在设计桌确定了计划，就可以在木工台上施工建造你的房子了。为了避免初学者常犯的错误，不要在没建立支撑的时候就直接盖屋顶！ 家庭生活空间 如果你有配偶或孩子，你肯定会想尽快把房子调整到适宜居住的状态。毫无疑问，你的爱人无非是想要个栖身之所和一张床，但孩子们怎么办? 别担心，只需要一张床和一个箱子或梳妆台来存放他们的宝贝，他们会非常满意的。 建材 你需要很多材料来完成房子，但没必要提前收集所有东西。除非你很赶时间，大可以分时分段使用材料进行建造。看着你的家从梦想变成现实是很不错的感觉。 所需的常见建材就是切好的原木、石料和黏土。所幸是这些东西在天际十分丰富，大多数建筑工地都能轻易找到黏土和石头的矿床。至于木材，所有伐木场老板都会很乐意出售并交付你的所有所需。 你还需要大量的钉子，不过好在即使是新手铁匠也能轻松地把铁打成钉子。 当你开始布置已经建好的房子时，你所需的材料就更加广泛了。其中包括稻草和玻璃，通常可以在杂货店买到。至于其他的，整个天际都可以成为你的供货商！ 雇佣管家 一旦你的庄园落成，你可能会雇佣一位管家来帮你打理事务。好的管家是无价的，可以帮你雇车夫、买牲畜，乃至替你去采购建材，总之可以让你自由地享受自己的劳动成果。 雇佣管家前，建议你把潜在的候选人带到庄园来，看看他们是否符合你的要求。记住，你是要把全部财产交到他们手中，所以得是完全可信任的人才行。 开始建造你的房子 本指南的剩余部分将为你提供构建每个房间的可选计划。 [pagebreak] [pagebreak] 小房子 在你的野心膨胀之前，建议先建个整洁的小屋来获得信心。这是个完美的入门级房屋，可能会直接满足你所需的一切。但也不必担心，如果你决定继续建造，可以随时把它改造成通往房子其他部分的玄关。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 主厅 你可能会嫌弃小房子远远不够，希望有个更大的房间容纳不断壮大的家庭？那么下一步就是增加一个主厅，将你的小屋变成壮观的庄园大宅，包括两个小卧室，一个里屋和一个大用餐区。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 扩建 建造好主厅之后，你的选择几乎无限，如果你还需要更多空间，你可以再扩建三个额外侧翼房间。 每个侧翼，你都有三种选择，总共有九种可添加的房间！（但请记住，你只能选择其中三个，请考虑清楚。） [pagebreak] 西翼-卧室 如果你的家庭需要比主厅更舒适的居住空间，那卧室是个完美的选择。卧室提供一张主床和两个儿童床的空间，兼有衣柜、橱柜等等，所有人的东西都能放下。该扩建还提供一个宽敞的户外平台。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 西翼-温室 也许你内心里还住着一个园丁？当真如此的话，温室为你提供种植空间，你可以种植几乎任何你想种的东西，并避开天际恶劣气候的影响。在你舒适的家中照料并收获你的作物吧！ [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 西翼-附魔师塔 如果你有志于魔法领域，这个塔楼扩建就是为你而设的。在私密舒适的地方进行实验。还有足够的空间保存你的收藏和制品。塔上的景色也一定会让你惊叹不已。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 北翼-储藏室 如果你只是需要更多的空间来存放你的许多财产和收藏品，那就给自己建一个储藏室吧。如果你建造了卧室或军械库的话，那么附带的户外平台甚至可以连接东翼或西翼的平台。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 北翼-战利品室 你是个喜欢炫耀战利品的巨物猎手吗？战利品可以让你随意选择摆放七个宏伟标本，一定能让您的访客感到惊讶并记忆犹新。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 北翼-炼金实验室 身为有抱负的炼金术师，这座塔楼将给你充足的舒适空间来磨炼技艺。当你在酿制药水是需要休息一下，也可以在塔顶欣赏美景。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 东翼-军械库 如果你喜欢成天敲打金属，或者纯粹就是个军械收藏家，那么军械库就是为你而设。充足的空间用于锻造，大量的地方来展示你的军械藏品，军械库在什么宅子都是完美的扩建选项。 [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 东翼-厨房 厨房提供一切你所需要追求的至高烹饪艺术。厌倦了在火上拿锅做菜？你还可以配一个新的烤箱！ [pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 东翼-藏书楼 藏书楼肯定会让那些重视文学的人感到高兴。有大量空间让你摆放书架，然后你就可以享受你的藏书了。或者可以带本书去塔顶，顺带俯瞰一下你的庄园？ [pagebreak]
