String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
Allow me to introduce myself. My name is <Alias=Jarl>, and I have the honor to be the Jarl of the proud and ancient city of <Alias=HoldCity>.
The fame of your exploits across Skyrim has brought you to my attention. If you are interested in becoming a Thane of <Alias=Hold> hold, I invite you to speak to me the next time you are in <Alias=HoldCity>. Aside from the honor that accrues to the title, my thanes are entitled to a personal housecarl. I also can tell you privately that a choice parcel of land in <Alias=Hold> would be available for your purchase should your services prove useful to me.
I look forward to meeting you in person.
I remain,
Jarl <Alias=Jarl> of <Alias=HoldCity>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> <Alias=Player>,
请允许我自我介绍。我名<Alias=Jarl>，很荣幸能执掌<Alias=HoldCity>这座骄傲而古老的城市。
你在天际的出色表现引起了我的注意。如果你有兴趣成为<Alias=Hold>的武卫，我邀请你在下次途径<Alias=HoldCity>与我面谈。除了爵位带来的荣誉之外，我还将授予你武卫的私人侍卫。还可以私下告诉你，如果你能好好为我效劳，我可以在<Alias=Hold>找一块土地供你购买。
期待你我早日见面。
此致
<Alias=HoldCity>领主<Alias=Jarl>

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> While you were away, we came to visit your lovely new house. <Alias=Spouse> made us feel right at home. In fact, we liked <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> so much we took <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> back to <Alias=BanditDungeon> with us.
If you want <Alias=Spouse> back, come see me. Bring <Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom> gold and I'll discuss letting <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> go.
Rochelle the Red
</font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 在你不在的时候，我们来参观了你可爱的新房。<Alias=Spouse>让我们有宾至如归之感。实际上，我们很喜欢<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>，所以我们把<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>带回了<Alias=BanditDungeon>。
如果你想要<Alias=Spouse>回去，就来找我吧。带好<Global=BYOHHBA2Ransom>金币，到时候咱们再讨论<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>回家的事。
“红发”罗谢尔
</font>

String.Source: You only need to add one of each item to the hatchery.
String.Dest: 每种物品只需各放一份至鱼苗场中。

String.Source: You awaken feeling a surge of Vampiric power.
String.Dest: 你醒来时感受到一股吸血鬼之力。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

R I F T E N Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen This package will provide furnishings and decor for your kitchen, which is the room immediately beyond your home's front door. This includes the lighting of the fire. Bedroom Adds bedside tables, a dresser and a small table with two chairs to the master bedroom. This also includes an upgrade to the bed itself. Alchemy Laboratory This package will place an alchemy crafting table in your basement, along with some shelves and other decor. Enchanting Laboratory This package will place an item enchanting table in your basement, along with some shelves and other decor. Also includes a few practice dummies to test your new enchantments on. Children's Bedroom Adds a comfortable child's bedroom to your cellar, including two beds, a wardrobe, dresser, play area, and wall hangings. If you have previously purchased the Enchanting Laboratory, these furnishings will replace it (and vice-versa). Garden When you purchase this package, the small patch of land adjacent to your house will be planted with a wide range of herbs, vegetables and other plants native to Skyrim.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

裂 谷 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 厨房 本套装将为厨房添置家具及装饰，厨房设置在您家前门后面的房间。其中包括火把照明。 卧室 主卧将增添几张床头柜、一个梳妆台和一张附带两把椅子的小桌子。其中包括对床的升级。 炼金实验室 本套装将在地下室放置炼金道具，附带架子和装饰。 附魔实验室 本套装将在地下室放置附魔道具，附带架子和装饰。还包括用来练习新魔法的假人。 儿童房 为您的地下室增加一个舒适的儿童卧室，包括两张床、一个衣柜、梳妆台、游戏区和壁挂。购置本套装将取代附魔实验室，反之亦然。 花园 您房子附近的小块土地可以用来种植各种花草、蔬菜以及其他天际原生植物。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

W H I T E R U N Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen Includes a fire pit, a small table and two chairs, as well as a shelf to store cooking supplies. Living Room Provides Wall-mounted shelves, a few side tables and two chairs placed near the fire pit, all near the center of the ground floor. Dining Room Adds a long wooden table and bench, as well as several shelves loaded with cutlery, dishes and cookware. Alchemy Laboratory This package adds an alchemy crafting station, a reading table and chair, and a large wardrobe to the rear area of the ground floor. This also includes the addition of a wall to divide the laboratory from the dining room. Children's Bedroom Instead of an Alchemy Laboratory, you can choose to furnish the room in the rear of your home with a cozy child's bedroom, including two beds, chests, and wall hangings. Note that this package will replace the Alchemy Laboratory if you have already purchased it (and vice-versa). Loft This package includes a few chairs and tables to fill out the upper-level loft. Bedroom Adds two bedside tables, a dresser and a small table with two chairs to the master bedroom. This also includes the addition of a wall to give the bedroom added privacy.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

白 漫 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 厨房 包括一个火坑、一张小桌和两把椅子，以及一个烹饪用架。 客厅 提供壁挂式置物架，并在地面层中心的火坑附近添置几张边桌和两把椅子。 餐厅 添置一张长木桌和长凳，以及摆放餐具炊具的架子。 炼金实验室 本套装新增一个炼金工艺台、一套书桌椅，一面放置于底层后方区域的大衣柜。除此之外还会新砌一面墙来隔离实验室与餐厅。 儿童房 除了炼金实验室，您也可以选择舒适的儿童房来填充您家后面的房间，其中包括两张床、两个箱子以及壁挂。请注意，本配置会取代您已经购置的炼金实验室。（反之亦然） 阁楼 本套装包括几个桌椅，用来填充上层阁楼。 卧室 主卧增加两个床头柜、一个梳妆台，还有一张附带两把椅子的小桌子。除此之外会添置一面隔墙，保证卧室的隐私。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

M A R K A R T H Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Entrance Hall When you purchase this package, floor mats and decorative planters will be added to the hallway just beyond the front door. Living Room This package fills out the home's large, central room with a large dining table, several smaller tables, shelves, a display case and other decor. Sleeping Quarters In addition to improved furnishings and decor for your master bedroom, this package also adds a small dining area between the guest and master bedroom, near the rear of the house. Alchemy Laboratory This package will furnish one the small rooms that adjoin the living room with the implements of an alchemist's laboratory. This includes an alchemy table, several shelves and added decor. Children's Bedroom This package supplies your home with everything needed for up to two children, including beds, a wardrobe, dresser, and other furnishings. Note that this package will replace your Alchemy Laboratory, and vice-versa. Enchanting Laboratory This package adds furniture and decor for a small enchanting laboratory adjoining the living room. This includes an enchanting table, shelves and decor.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

马 卡 斯 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 门厅 本套装会在玄关走廊添加地垫和装饰花盆。 客厅 本套装将填充中央的大房间，包含一张大餐桌、几张小桌、书架、一个陈列柜和其他装饰物。 卧室区 本套装将改善主卧室的家具与装饰，同时在靠近房子后部，客卧与主卧之间的区域增加一个小用餐区。 炼金实验室 本套装将在毗邻客厅的小房间中配置一套炼金工具。包括炼金台、几个架子和其他装饰。 儿童房 本套装可以为您家提供两名儿童所需的一切，包括床、衣柜、梳妆台及其他家具。请注意，本套装将取代炼金实验室，反之亦然。 附魔实验室 本套装将在毗邻客厅的小房间中配置一套附魔工具及装饰。包括奥术附魔台、书架和装饰。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

S O L I T U D E Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Living Room This package adds a large table, chairs and a wide range of decor to the living area located centrally on the second floor of the house. Sleeping Quarters When you purchase this package, the master bedroom on the second floor of the house will be decorated with several furnishings and a larger, more luxurious bed. Also, a small dining area will be added just outside the bedroom door that includes a table, chairs and other decorations. Children's Bedroom This package provides elegant and comfortable accommodations for up to two children, including fine beds, a wardrobe, personal chests, and other decor. The purchase price includes the cost of new construction: this room will be added to the second floor of your home, next to your master bedroom. Alchemy Laboratory Fills out one of the ground floor rooms with implements and tools for an alchemy laboratory, including an alchemist's crafting table and related decor. Enchanting Laboratory Will stock one of the home's small ground-floor rooms with all of the furnishings for an enchanting laboratory, including an enchanter's crafting table. Also includes several practice dummies on which you can test out your new enchantments. Patio Places a small table, two chairs and other furnishings on the stone patio outside the back of the house.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

独 孤 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 客厅 为位于住宅二楼中心的生活区添置一张大桌子以及椅子和各种装饰。 卧室 为二楼主卧添置装饰家居和一张更大更豪华的床。此外，在卧室门外添加一个小用餐区，包括一张桌子，几把椅子和其他装饰。 儿童房 本套装为至多两名孩子提供优雅舒适的居住条件，包括精致的床、一个衣柜、个人储物柜和其他装饰。购买定价中包括新建筑成本，该房间将设置在您二楼主卧的旁边。 炼金实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上炼金设备，包括炼金台和相关装饰。 附魔实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上附魔设备，包括奥术附魔台，还有几个测试新魔法的练习假人。 露台 在房子后面的石制露台上添加一张小桌子、两把椅子和其他家具。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

W I N D H E L M Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen Includes a fireplace, a table for two and ample shelving to store your food and cooking supplies. Living Room This package fills Hjerim's spacious ground floor living room with several tables, chairs and shelves. Decorations for the floor and walls are also included. Alchemy Laboratory Adds an alchemy crafting station. Enchanting Laboratory Adds an enchanting crafting station. Upstairs Landing This package adds several weapon racks and display cases, and lines the walls with mounted animal heads. Bedroom Provides an upgrade to your bed, as well as shelving, display cases, improved lighting and other bedroom furnishings and decor. Guest Room Improves the furnishings and decor in your home's guest bedroom, including a finer-quality bed, a small table, and some shelves. Children's Bedroom Expands the corner room in the rear of the first floor of your house, converting it into a bedroom suitable for up to two children, including beds, a chest, dresser, and other decor.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

风 舵 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 厨房 包含一个壁炉，一张双人桌，以及足够储存食物与烹饪用品的架子。 客厅 本套装可以填满霜斋一楼宽敞的客厅，包括几套桌椅以及架子。同时还包含地板和墙体的装饰。 炼金实验室 增加一个炼金制作台 附魔实验室 增加一个附魔制作台 楼上平台 本套装增加几个武器架和展示柜，在墙上安装兽头装饰。 卧室 升级您的床铺，提供书架、展示柜、装饰，并改善照明。 客房 改善您客房的家具装饰。包括质量更好的床，一张小桌子和一些架子。 儿童房 将房子一层后面的角落房间扩大，改为最多容纳两个孩子的卧室，包括床、衣柜、梳妆台和其他装饰。

String.Source: Ah, I see. Well, it's possible that the property will still be available when you amass the necessary funds.
String.Dest: 啊，我明白了。等你攒够钱，可能房子还在售。

String.Source: Yes. It's a fine property. Well-watered, plentiful stands of timber, beautiful view.
String.Dest: 没错。这是个很不错的地点。水源充足、树木茂盛，而且景色优美。

String.Source: Ah, excellent. The Jarl was hoping you would be interested.
String.Dest: 啊，太好了。领主很希望你能感兴趣。

String.Source: Thank you! Let me know if you have anything you need from me. I'm at your service.
String.Dest: 谢谢！如果有什么需要我帮忙的，尽管告诉我。我随时为您效劳。

String.Source: There's no house available, but I could sell you a fine piece of land where you could build your own house.
String.Dest: 现在已经没有现成的房子了，但我可以卖你一块好地皮，你可以在那里自己盖房。

String.Source: Follow the road east from Falkreath, then north at the crossroads. Turn left just past Pinewatch.
String.Dest: 顺着佛克瑞斯向东走，到了十字路口向北。过松木监视哨左转。

String.Source: You won't regret it. Here's the title to your steading.
String.Dest: 你不会后悔的。这是你的庄园所有凭证。

String.Source: A fine steading like this needs a good steward. I'd be happy to take on that position, if you'd like.
String.Dest: 这么好的庄园应该需要一个好管家。如果你愿意，我很乐意担任。

String.Source: Of course. I didn't mean to meddle in your private affairs.
String.Dest: 没问题。我不会干涉你的私人事务。

String.Source: I'm a married man! Hey, where should we live? I guess you could always stay with me.
String.Dest: 我也是结了婚的男人了！嘿，咱们要住哪里？你可以和我住一起。

String.Source: Here's a letter from the Jarl's steward. Looks like official business.
String.Dest: 这是领主总管寄来的信，似乎是有公务。

String.Source: You already have children, don't you? I'm sorry, but I can't let you adopt anyone else.
String.Dest: 你已经有孩子了不是吗？抱歉，但我不能再让你领养更多了。

String.Source: They... they're dead. My mama died when I was little. I... I don't remember her very well.
String.Dest: 他们……他们去世了。我妈妈在我很小的时候就死了。我……已经记不清她的样子了。

String.Source: Why yes, yes of course! What a wonderful surprise!
String.Dest: 当然，当然！真是太惊喜了！

String.Source: Oh, but... you have children, don't you? We'll have to find somewhere with room for them.
String.Dest: 哦，但是……你已经有孩子了，不是吗？我们得找个能让他们住的地方。

String.Source: Not much. But I hope you like them!
String.Dest: 不算太多。但希望你喜欢！

String.Source: Bits and Pieces in Solitude is probably the place to start. They sell all sorts of things like that.
String.Dest: 独孤城的零珠碎玉是我们的首选。他们那里有各式各样的东西。

String.Source: I'm sorry, no. Grelod is the headmistress here, and she's decided not to allow any adoptions right now.
String.Dest: 抱歉，不行。桂罗是这里的院长，她现在不允许任何人来领养。

String.Source: What do you want to play?
I'm Hroar. You know, like the sound the lion makes? That's what my mother used to say.
String.Dest: 我叫赫洛阿。很像狮子的吼叫吧？我妈妈以前也这么说。

String.Source: I... I'll be all right. Please, just... just make it stop!
String.Dest: 我……我会没事的。只是，拜托……请阻止它！

String.Source: Ah, good. There's one I've had my eye on. I'll see if it's still for sale.
String.Dest: 啊，没问题。我刚好看上一个。我去看看还有没有在卖。

String.Source: Papa said we could go fishing! With my help, I'm sure he'll catch something this time!
String.Dest: 爸爸说我们可以去钓鱼！有我帮忙，这次他一定能钓到大鱼！

String.Source: Just fine, love. The weather here is wonderful, perfect for playing outdoors.
String.Dest: 还好，亲爱的。这里天气很好，很适合孩子们在户外玩耍。

String.Source: My father is Alvor, the blacksmith. I'm his assistant. I mean, apprentice.
String.Dest: 我父亲是铁匠阿尔沃。我是他的助手，我是说，徒弟。

String.Source: You're here to adopt someone? Really? Oh, wow!
String.Dest: 你要收养孩子吗？真的吗？哇哦！

String.Source: Braith is a big meanie. She keeps telling Lars 'n me what to do. I don't wanna play with her anymore.
String.Dest: 布赖斯就是个大坏蛋。总是对我和拉斯指手画脚。我不想和她玩了。

String.Source: Fine, fine. Living out here on our own will take some getting used to, but I think it'll be good for us.
String.Dest: 很好，很好。我们自己住在这里还需要花点时间来适应，但我想这里对我们来说不错。

String.Source: This place is scary. There are monsters in the swamp. I just know it!
String.Dest: 这地方太吓人了。沼泽里有怪物。我知道的！

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Falkreath. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为佛克瑞斯武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: Congratulations. I hope you have a wonderful life together.
String.Dest: 恭喜。祝愿你们一起生活美满。

String.Source: I'm sorry, but you can't afford that right now.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，但您现在好像负担不起了。

String.Source: What is it? What is it?
I need to be sure your child will have a safe, stable home to grow up in.
String.Dest: 我需要你确保你的孩子有一个安全稳定的家庭去成长。

String.Source: I got you a present, Mama! I hope you like it!
String.Dest: 妈妈，我给您准备了礼物！希望您喜欢！

String.Source: You got me a present? Really?
String.Dest: 您给我带礼物了？真的吗？

String.Source: You'll need to build a pen for it first.
I'm all alone. I... I try to sell flowers so I can buy food. It's not much but... what else can I do?
String.Dest: 我现在一个人。我……就试着卖点花，这样就能买吃的了。虽然不太多，但……我还能怎么办呢？

String.Source: Aww... come on. Just a few more minutes? Please?
String.Dest: 嗷……拜托了。就再待几分钟？好吗？

String.Source: I've been the only girl here since forever. The boys pick on me, and they make me do all the chores.
String.Dest: 我一直都是这里唯一的女孩子。男孩都喜欢找我麻烦，他们把所有家务都丢给我。

String.Source: Look at all the snow! I want to go sledding! Or skating!
String.Dest: 看看这些雪！我想去滑雪橇！或者滑冰！

String.Source: Are you really gonna adopt one of us?
String.Dest: 你真的要收养我们中的谁吗？

String.Source: I found something for you. It... sounds like things have been bad lately, so... I hope this cheers you up.
String.Dest: 我给您找到些东西。最近……情况好像不太好，所以……我希望您能高兴点。

String.Source: Pa said he'd take me hunting soon. I can't wait! I bet I'll bring down a mammoth!
String.Dest: 爸说很快就能带我去打猎了。我都等不及了！我打赌我能打倒一头猛犸！

String.Source: Just... just let me get my things and say goodbye to everyone. I'll meet you at home. Thanks! Thanks again!
String.Dest: 只是……我要先收拾东西，和大家道个别。我会到家等您。谢谢！谢谢您！

String.Source: Is there anything else you need?
That big tree in the park looks so sad... I feel sorry for it.
String.Dest: 公园里那棵大树看起来好可惜……真替她难过。

String.Source: A new home! Wow! I can't wait to see it!
String.Dest: 是新家！哇！我等不及去看了！

String.Source: Both my parents were in the Legion. There was... an ambush.
String.Dest: 我父母都是军团的。他们……中了埋伏。

String.Source: I grant you a personal Housecarl, and this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我会授予你一名私人侍卫，并从我的军械库中取出这把武器作为你的贵族身份象征。

String.Source: It's so c-c-cold here! If I play outside for too long, I'm going to freeze solid!
String.Dest: 这里太勒勒冷了！去外面玩会冻僵的！

String.Source: You probably want someone else. I'm just the stable boy.
String.Dest: 你可能是要找别人。我就是个马童。

String.Source: The land is on the coast, across the Karth delta from Solitude. An inspiring location, as you'll see.
String.Dest: 这片地在海岸边，和独孤城隔着卡斯三角洲。这地方很提振人心的。

String.Source: I think we may have a problem in the basement. Been hearing a lot of scurrying down there lately.
String.Dest: 我觉得地窖出了些问题。最近经常有东西跑来跑去。

String.Source: Just fine. Whiterun is a lovely city, and there are so many other children here- they all love playing together.
String.Dest: 很好。白漫是座很可爱的城市，孩子也很多，他们很喜欢在一起玩。

String.Source: Yes. It's on the north coast of Hjaalmarch, with a magnificent view of Solitude on its crag. Just the place for a new manor house.
String.Dest: 没错。这块地位于希雅陲北面的海岸边，可以看到悬崖上面独孤城的壮丽景色。是个建庄园的好地方。

String.Source: I hate Markarth. There's nowhere to play! It's all just rocks. Rocks rocks rocks.
String.Dest: 我讨厌马卡斯。这里没地方可玩！到处都是石头。石头石头石头。

String.Source: There are lots of scary people here, Mama. Promise you'll keep me safe?
String.Dest: 妈妈，这里有好多可怕的人。你能保护我吗？

String.Source: I hate it. Everyone feels sorry for me, so they don't treat me too bad, but...
String.Dest: 我讨厌那里。每个人都很可怜我，所以对我不算太坏，但是……

String.Source: Excellent. We're glad to have you as a landowner in Hjaalmarch. Here's the title to your steading.
String.Dest: 太好了。我们很高兴你能成为希雅陲的地主。这是你的产权凭证。

String.Source: Fine, just fine. This house is perfect for a growing family.
String.Dest: 很好，很好。这房子很适合一个正在成长的家庭。

String.Source: Very well, let's try this again...
You know Belethor's shop in Whiterun? That'd be a good place to start. He carries all sorts of things like that.
String.Dest: 你知道贝莱托尔在白漫城开的店吗？那里就很不错。他那里东西很丰富。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: Sure! What do you want to play?
Did you really build this house all by yourself? Wow!
String.Dest: 这房子是您一个人造的？哇哦！

String.Source: The Palace looks so pretty. I wish they'd let me inside...
String.Dest: 宫殿真漂亮。希望他们能允许我进去看看……

String.Source: I... I guess it would be all right if you want to adopt me. At least until my real parents get back.
String.Dest: 我……我猜你收养我也没什么问题。至少在我亲生父母回来之前。

String.Source: You got me a present? Wow, thanks, Ma!
String.Dest: 您给我带礼物了？哇，谢谢妈！

String.Source: You have children, though, don't you? We'll have to find somewhere with room for them, too.
String.Dest: 但你有孩子了，不是吗？我们也得找个能让他们住下的地方。

String.Source: Someday I'll take over the mill... when I'm old enough.
String.Dest: 总有一天我会接管木材厂……等我长大以后。

String.Source: Really? Do you... do you have a place I could live?
String.Dest: 真的吗？你……你真的有地方让我住吗？

String.Source: Lars is such a milk-drinker. He can't even stand up to a girl.
String.Dest: 拉斯是个胆小鬼。连女孩子都不敢面对。

String.Source: My papa died and... and I'm all alone...
String.Dest: 我爸爸去世了……现在我是个孤儿了……

String.Source: I take care of the horses. And the goats. And the chickens. And the garden.
String.Dest: 我要照顾马、羊、鸡，还有花园。

String.Source: Well enough. Riften's a tough city, but... it's a tough world. Kid has to learn to stand up for themselves sometime.
String.Dest: 很好。裂谷城是个艰难的城市，但……世界本就艰难。孩子早晚也要学会自己面对一切。

String.Source: My ma died, and... and I don't know what to do...
String.Dest: 我妈去世了……我，我不知道该怎么办了……

String.Source: Do you think I could be a Bard? I really like singing.
String.Dest: 您觉得我能当吟游诗人吗？我很喜欢唱歌。

String.Source: Constance and the others are nice enough, but I... I want to have a real family.
String.Dest: 康斯坦斯和其他人都很好，但我……还是想要一个真正的家。

String.Source: Hmm. You might try Gray Pine Goods in Falkreath. They carry all sorts of things like that.
String.Dest: 嗯。你可以去佛克瑞斯的灰松木杂货店看看。他们那里有各式各样的东西。

String.Source: Hmph. This city's crawling with thieves. Cowards. Kid could learn some bad habits here.
String.Dest: 嗯。这座城市遍地都是小偷和懦夫。孩子们可能会学坏。

String.Source: This war has created so many orphans, and so few are willing to open their hearts to them...
String.Dest: 这场战争造就了这么多孤儿，却很少有人愿意向他们敞开心扉……

String.Source: Well, that's your business. Was there anything else you needed?
String.Dest: 好吧，反正是你的事。你还有什么需要吗？

String.Source: Sure thing, friend. I'll even have it delivered to your building site, no charge.
String.Dest: 没问题，朋友。我还可以给你送到工地，不要钱。

String.Source: Fine, fine. This city's not safe, but... that's good. Keeps a kid on edge, alert. Could keep 'em alive when they grow up.
String.Dest: 好，很好。这座城市不太安全，但……很好。要让孩子们保持紧张、警惕。这样才能让他们长大后活下去。

String.Source: You tell me. Between the Forsworn and the mines, Markarth is no place to raise a child.
String.Dest: 你说说。马卡斯这种除了矿场就是弃誓者的地方，怎么能养好孩子。

String.Source: Good. This is a city that respects strength. Honors it. A good lesson for children to learn.
String.Dest: 很好。这是个尊重实力的城市。向它致敬。这是孩子们值得学习的。

String.Source: Certainly. I'll have it delivered to the chest near your workbenches.
String.Dest: 没问题。我会把东西送到你工作台附近的箱子里。

String.Source: I was just getting settled in. Where are we going?
String.Dest: 我才刚安顿下来啊。我们搬去哪儿？

String.Source: Fine, fine. Plenty of kids here to play and spar with. Plenty of trades to learn. It's a good place to raise a child.
String.Dest: 好，很好。这里有很多孩子一起玩闹。还有很多行当可以学习。是个养孩子的好地方。

String.Source: I want to be big and strong like a lion, too. Someday.
String.Dest: 我也想像狮子一样又大又壮。也许有那天吧。

String.Source: Very good, I'll make all the arrangements.
String.Dest: 很好，我会负责安排好一切的。

String.Source: Very well, I'll make the arrangements. The next time you visit your house, your new furnishings will be in place.
String.Dest: 很好，我这就安排。下次去房子时，您的新家具就到位了。

String.Source: Thanks... thanks for talking to me.
String.Dest: 谢谢……谢谢你愿意和我说话。

String.Source: What do you do for a living?
Doing some building, eh? We can deliver it wherever you need.
String.Dest: 在盖房吗？我们可以送到你指定的地方。

String.Source: I'll have them hauled over right away.
Couldn't be better. Whiterun is perfect for a child- great weather, plenty of space, friends to play with. What more could you want?
String.Dest: 再好不过了。白漫城非常适合孩子们成长，天气好，空间大，还有朋友一起玩。夫复何求？

String.Source: Look what I found! Here, take it!
String.Dest: 看看我找到了什么！给，收下吧！

String.Source: I played with Lucia in the park today. I feel sorry for her.
String.Dest: 我今天和露西亚在公园玩。我好替她难过。

String.Source: That's all I need from you. Congratulations! I think you'll make an excellent parent.
String.Dest: 这就是我对你的全部请求了。恭喜！我觉得你会是个好家长的。

String.Source: I'm sorry, but until you own a home with a room for your children, I can't allow you to adopt anyone.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，但在你拥有房子和儿童房间前，我不能让你把任何孩子领走。

String.Source: Show me that you can support a child. Buy a house. Furnish it. Then come back, and we'll talk.
String.Dest: 你需要有能力抚养孩子。买一所房子。装修好。然后回来，我们再谈。

String.Source: Hmph. This city's crawling with filth. It's everything I can do keep the children safe.
String.Dest: 哎。这城市到处都是污秽。我只能尽一切努力保证孩子们的安全。

String.Source: This is the happiest day of my life. Where should we live? My home is your home now, of course.
String.Dest: 这是我一生中最快乐的一天。我们该住在哪里呢？当然了，我家就是你家。

String.Source: Once you've made a decision, I'll collect their things and be sure they make it over to your house.
String.Dest: 等你做好决定，我会帮他们收拾好东西，并把他们安全送到你家。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: Certainly. What did you have in mind?
String.Dest: 当然可以。你有什么想法？

String.Source: As well as can be expected. Dear, this house would work for the two of us, but with children? We need to find a bigger place.
String.Dest: 和预想的一样好，亲爱的，这房子只适合我们俩人住，但有了孩子？我们得找个大点的地方。

String.Source: Talk to Geimund if you want a horse, or Katla if you're looking for work. I can't help you.
String.Dest: 如果你是想买马，可以找盖伊姆德，凯特拉那里也有工作可以做。我帮不了你。

String.Source: Sure thing, friend. I can use a break anyway.
String.Dest: 没问题，朋友。反正我还可以休息一下。

String.Source: I... I wish things were otherwise. All of these children deserve a better home. But there's nothing I can do.
String.Dest: 我……我也不希望事情这样。这些孩子都应该有个更好的家。可我无能为力。

String.Source: Could you give me an allowance?
First, I'll need to ask you a few questions.
String.Dest: 首先，我要问你几个问题。

String.Source: It's too bad the orphanage ain't letting us kids get adopted. I'd be the best son ever.
String.Dest: 孤儿院不让我们这些孩子被领养真是太糟了。我会成为最好的儿子的。

String.Source: I think you'll want a stable before we spend good coin on a horse.
String.Dest: 我想咱们在花大价钱买马之前，应该先建一座马厩。

String.Source: I'd be honored to be your steward. You've built a fine steading here.
String.Dest: 很荣幸能成为您的管家。您在这里建的房屋很不错。

String.Source: I can't believe Grelod is dead. I had no love for the woman, but to be murdered, in cold blood...
String.Dest: 真不敢相信桂罗死了。我一点也不喜欢这个女人，但被谋杀，还是太残忍了……
您有给我带什么回来吗？

String.Source: I wound up here, but... I... I don't know what to do. I miss her so much...
String.Dest: 所以我就来了这里，但……我……我不知道该怎么办。我太想她了……

String.Source: Look, don't waste my time. Come back when you're ready to discuss this for real.
String.Dest: 听着，别浪费我的时间。等你真心想谈论这件事再来吧。

String.Source: Really? Are you... are you sure?
Of course. What room would you like me to furnish?
String.Dest: 当然。需要我布置哪个房间？

String.Source: The Argonians at the docks say they can breathe underwater. I wish I could do that...
String.Dest: 码头上的阿尔贡说他们能在水下呼吸。真希望我也能做到……

String.Source: Yes, of course! That's wonderful news!
I got you a present, Ma! I hope you like it!
String.Dest: 妈，我给您准备了礼物！希望您喜欢！

String.Source: My... my parents died, and... and now I'm all alone...
String.Dest: 我的……父母去世了……现在只剩我一个人了……
……哦。不管怎么样，还是要谢谢你……

String.Source: Well, love, very well. There's so much history in this city, so many things we can do here.
String.Dest: 嗯，亲爱的，很好。这座城市很有历史底蕴，我们在这里有很多事可做。

String.Source: I got you a present, Papa! I hope you like it!
String.Dest: 爸爸，我给您准备了礼物！希望您喜欢！

String.Source: Mama took me to the market! There were lot of pies and cakes there. She said she'd show me how to bake one!
String.Dest: 妈妈带我去市场了！那里有好多派和蛋糕。她说可以教我怎么烤！

String.Source: Papa! We're playing a game. Do you want to play?
String.Dest: 爸爸！我们在玩游戏。您想一起玩吗？

String.Source: Go on, speak to the children! I'm sure they're eager to meet you.
String.Dest: 请吧，和孩子们说说话！相信他们一定很想见你。

String.Source: I'm gonna join the Stormcloaks. They're the best!
String.Dest: 我要去加入风暴斗篷。他们太棒了！

String.Source: I need to get my things and say goodbye to everyone. I'll meet you at home. Thanks! Thanks so much!
String.Dest: 我得去收拾东西，和大家道个别。我到家里等您。谢谢！太谢谢了！

String.Source: Congratulations! If you ever want to adopt another child, you'll always be welcome here.
String.Dest: 恭喜！如果你还想领养其他孩子，这里永远欢迎你。

String.Source: Mama died, and now I'm... I'm all alone...
String.Dest: 妈妈死了，现在……就剩我一个人了……

String.Source: Oh, wow! Are you... are you sure? You really wouldn't mind?
String.Dest: 哦，哇喔！是……是真的吗？你真的不介意吗？

String.Source: Grimvar said a boy used to live in that abandoned house, all alone, 'til the Dark Brotherhood came 'n got him. Scary, huh?
String.Dest: 格利斯瓦说有个男孩以前独自住在那栋废弃的房子里，直到黑暗兄弟会来找他。很可怕吧？

String.Source: Don't pay much, but they let me sleep by the fire in the inn most nights.
String.Dest: 虽然赚的不多，但他们大多数时候都能让我睡在旅馆的火炉旁边。

String.Source: My father was a Stormcloak soldier. One day, he left and... didn't come back.
String.Dest: 我父亲是个风暴斗篷士兵。有一天他走了……就再也没回来。

String.Source: What? What kind of a joke is this?
Ma took me to the market. We saw this huge fish! I bet even you couldn't lift it!
String.Dest: 妈带我去市场了。我们看见了一条大鱼！我打赌您也举不起来！

String.Source: You want to adopt one of us, right? I'm strong, I'm fast, I'm smart, I can do anything better than them. Come on, pick me? Please?
String.Dest: 你想收养我们中的一个吗？我很强壮，也很勤快，还很聪明。我做任何事情都比他们更好。拜托，选我？好吗？

String.Source: Hi Mister! Would you like to buy some flowers? Please?
String.Dest: 你好啊先生！你想买些花吗？可以吗？

String.Source: Lady, could you spare a coin?
You came to visit! It's so much better here with Grelod gone. Thanks to you.
String.Dest: 你来了！自从桂罗死了这里好多了。谢谢你。
……哦。不管怎么样，还是要谢谢你……

String.Source: Maramal said I could visit the temple whenever I wanted.
String.Dest: 玛拉莫说我可以随时去神殿参观。

String.Source: I climbed all the way up to the temple, but they said I wasn't old enough to get in. They're just mean.
String.Dest: 我一路爬到神殿，但他们却说我太小了，不能进去。他们真小气。

String.Source: There aren't any houses for sale in Morthal. But if you're interested, I could sell you land in the hold where you could build your own house.
String.Dest: 莫萨尔没有现房出售了。但如果你感兴趣，我可以卖给你一块领内的土地，你可以自己在那里建房。

String.Source: Yes, it is. The Jarl thought of you when it came up for sale.
String.Dest: 没错。要卖的时候，领主想起了你。

String.Source: Fine, love. I think the fresh air does wonders for all of us, and this house... it's just perfect.
String.Dest: 很好，亲爱的。我觉得新鲜的空气对我们都很好，这座房子……很完美。

String.Source: Very well, love. This is a beautiful house, and Solitude is so safe, so diverse. It's a wonderful place to raise a child.
String.Dest: 很好，亲爱的。这房子很漂亮，而且独孤城很安全，也很多样。是抚养孩子的好地方。

String.Source: I guess we have our entire lives together, now. Where should we live? You could stay with me....
String.Dest: 看来我们这一辈子都要永远在一起了。我们到哪里去住？你可以和我在一起……

String.Source: Yea! Thanks, Mama! I promise, I'll be the best daughter ever!
String.Dest: 耶！谢谢妈妈！我保证，我会是您最好的女儿！

String.Source: Mister Brynjolf gave me an apple, Papa! He seems nice.
String.Dest: 爸爸，布林乔夫先生给了我一个苹果！他看起来人很好。

String.Source: Aicantar let me see his museum. It's really nice.
String.Dest: 爱坎塔让我参观他的博物馆。真是太棒了。

String.Source: Very good. I'll see about hiring a carriage driver at once.
String.Dest: 很好。我马上就去雇个车夫回来。

String.Source: Fine, when we're not fending off attacks by wolves. Or bears. Or giant spiders. Honestly, what were you thinking, sending us out here?
String.Dest: 好吧，除非我们能抵御住狼、熊、还有巨型蜘蛛的袭击。说实话，把我们搬到这里，你是怎么想的？

String.Source: If you don't mind getting your feet wet, your best bet is to head north past the mill. The odd tomb or two along the way won't bother you.
String.Dest: 如果你不介意把脚弄湿，最好从伐木场向北。沿途有个把坟墓也不会有什么事的。

String.Source: Great. There's so much history here in Windhelm, so much to learn about our ancestors and our land.
String.Dest: 太好了。风舵城历史很悠久，能够了解到和我们的祖先和土地更多的东西。

String.Source: Dragonsreach is so cool! All the kids there are mean, though.
String.Dest: 龙临宫太酷了！不过那里的孩子都很小气。

String.Source: Mama! We're playing a game. Do you want to play?
String.Dest: 妈妈！我们在玩游戏。您想一起玩吗？

String.Source: Hey, Pa, I got you something! I hope you like it!
String.Dest: 嘿，爸，我给您准备了东西！希望您喜欢！

String.Source: My mother and father brought me here a year ago. They said they'd be back soon, but... they're awfully late.
String.Dest: 我的父母一年前把我带到这里。他们说很快就会回来，但是……他们还是没有来。

String.Source: Please, won't you buy a flower?
When I grow up, I wanna join the Legion!
String.Dest: 等我长大了，我也要加入军团！

String.Source: You got me a present? Wow, thanks, Pa!
String.Dest: 您给我带礼物了？哇，谢谢爸！

String.Source: I saw a Thalmor the other day. He was really scary!
String.Dest: 我前几天看见了一个梭默。他长得好吓人！

String.Source: My... my parents died, not too long ago. I... I don't know what to do...
String.Dest: 我……我的父母不久前去世了。我不知道该怎么办了……

String.Source: I went fishing at the lake. I almost caught something!
String.Dest: 我去湖边钓鱼了。差点就钓到了！

String.Source: Oh, fine. So many guards on the street here I hardly have to worry.
String.Dest: 哦，很好。街上卫兵很多，我根本不用担心。

String.Source: But you have kids, right? We should find a home where we can live together.
String.Dest: 但你有孩子了吧？我们得找个能一起生活的家。

String.Source: I know we don't have much money, but I... I wanted to get you something. It's not much, but...
String.Dest: 我知道咱们的钱不多，但是……我想给您买些东西。虽然不多，但是……

String.Source: My pa was a sailor. Took me with him on his last trip. After he got sick, they... put us off here and left without us.
String.Dest: 我爸是个水手。他最后一次出航的时候带着我。他生病后……船员就把我们撇在这里离开了。

String.Source: It's... it's what Brenuin said I should do. He's the only one that's been nice to me since... since mama...
String.Dest: 是……是布瑞纽恩告诉我的。他是唯一一个对我这么好的人，自从……自从妈妈……

String.Source: Hey, Ma! Want to play a game with us?
String.Dest: 嘿，妈！您想不想和我们玩个游戏？

String.Source: Mister Brynjolf said he could teach me a lot of neat things when I'm older.
String.Dest: 布林乔夫先生说等我长大了，可以教我好些好东西。

String.Source: Banning said I could come play with his dogs. I want a dog.
String.Dest: 班宁说我可以和他的狗一起玩。我也想要一只狗。

String.Source: But it's not even dark yet!
Honestly, I'm a little worried. Markarth is nice enough, but... I wonder if it's really safe for children.
String.Dest: 说实话，我有点担心。马卡斯的人是很好，但……我不确定对孩子来说安不安全。

String.Source: Wha? But.... but it's dark out. Is it... really okay?
String.Dest: 什么？但是……外面还很黑。真的……好吗？

String.Source: Oh really? And where were you thinking?
String.Dest: 哦真的？你想搬去哪儿呢？

String.Source: Wow! I can't wait to see my new home!
String.Dest: 哇！我等不及要看我的新家了！

String.Source: All right, I'll see you there!
Make it stop! Please, make it stop!
String.Dest: 阻止它！求你了，快阻止它！

String.Source: Name's Samuel. Never met my parents. Grelod said my mother worked here at the Orphanage, but she died when I was born.
String.Dest: 我叫萨穆埃尔。我从来没见过父母。桂罗说我母亲在孤儿院工作，但我出生时她就去世了。

String.Source: Could I get a few gold to spend? Please?
String.Dest: 能给我些金币吗？求您了。

String.Source: We face the world together now. Where should we live? My home is yours.
String.Dest: 我们现在要一起面对世界了。我们到哪里住呢？来我家住也行哦。

String.Source: Hey, Pa! You want to play a game with us?
String.Dest: 嘿，爸！您想不想和我们玩个游戏？

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Hjaalmarch. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为希雅陲武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: I'm sorry, but the children aren't up for adoption right now. You should go.
String.Dest: 抱歉，但孩子们现在还不能被收养。你得走了。

String.Source: Rolff says I shouldn't go to the Grey Quarter anymore. He said it's not safe there.
String.Dest: 罗尔夫跟我说不要再去灰民区了。他说那里不安全。

String.Source: I'll keep an eye out for a good cow to purchase.
String.Dest: 我会留意买一头好奶牛的。

String.Source: Hey, Ma! Want to play a game with us?
String.Dest: 嘿，妈！您想不想和我们玩个游戏？

String.Source: Better than ever. Nothing like living off the land to teach you how to fight, how to survive. We'll have a little warrior on our hands in no time.
String.Dest: 比以前任何地方都好。没有什么比靠地吃饭更能教会如何战斗如何生存了。我们很快就能培养出小战士了。

String.Source: I like living here. The lake is so pretty.
String.Dest: 我喜欢这里。这湖真漂亮。

String.Source: What... what am I going to do?
Meh. Children get soft when they're coddled in a place like this.
String.Dest: 哎。孩子们在这种地方会被宠坏变得娇弱的。

String.Source: We're married. I guess we'll need to decide where we're living, won't we? You can always stay with me.
String.Dest: 我们结婚了。我想咱们应该决定一下住在哪里了对吧？你可以跟我一直住一起。

String.Source: I wanna go swimming, but the guards keep yelling at me. The canal's not that dirty...
String.Dest: 我想去游泳，但卫兵总是对我大喊大叫。运河又没那么脏……

String.Source: I guess it could be worse. But... I'm sick of sleeping outside with the horses. I want a real home, real parents. Not... this.
String.Dest: 我知道现在还不算太糟。但是……我厌倦了和马睡在外面了。我想要真正的家和父母。而不是……这样。

String.Source: Wow, really? What'd you get me?
String.Dest: 哇，真的？您给我带什么了？

String.Source: I'm running food and supplies to the miners.
String.Dest: 我在帮矿工送食物和补给。

String.Source: So I like to have a little fun, so what?
String.Dest: 我喜欢开点小玩笑，那又怎样啊？

String.Source: I'll see to it at once.
Hey, Pa! You want to play a game with us?
String.Dest: 嘿，爸！您想不想和我们玩个游戏？

String.Source: Some pretty flowers. I picked them all by myself!
String.Dest: 很漂亮的花。都是我自己摘的！

String.Source: ...since she died. My aunt and uncle took over our farm and threw me out. Said I wasn't good for anything.
String.Dest: ……自从她去世。我的阿姨和姨夫接管了我们的农场，把我赶出来了。他们说我一无是处。

String.Source: Pick one of the others. I'll be fine.
String.Dest: 从其他人里选一个吧。我没关系的。

String.Source: Katla said she'd feed me if I could make myself useful. I take care of the animals, run errands, that kind of thing.
String.Dest: 凯特拉说如果我能帮忙，就给我吃的。所以我负责照看动物，跑跑腿之类的。

String.Source: Wha... seriously? No way... With this, I... I could buy everything in the market! Wow! Thanks!
String.Dest: 真……真的吗？天呐……有了这些，我……我可以到市场上随便买东西了！哇！谢谢！

String.Source: Hi Lady! Would you like to buy some flowers? Please?
String.Dest: 你好啊夫人！你想买些花吗？可以吗？

String.Source: I like it here. The tree in the park is so pretty!
String.Dest: 我喜欢这里。公园里的那棵树真漂亮！

String.Source: I grant you a personal Housecarl, and this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我会授予你一名私人侍卫，并从我的军械库中取出这把武器作为你的贵族身份象征。

String.Source: I can't just give away good timber.
String.Dest: 我不能就这么把好木料送人啊。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: Did you get me a present?
Mister, could you spare a coin?
We should find a place with room for your kids, though.
String.Dest: 不过我们应该找个能给你的孩子们住的地方。

String.Source: There's a new lady in charge of the Orphanage in Riften. She asked me to hand out these notices to everyone I met.
String.Dest: 裂谷城新换了一位女士负责孤儿院。她让我把这些通知派发给遇到的每一个人。

String.Source: Go meet the children and decide who you'd like to adopt.
String.Dest: 去见见孩子们吧，然后决定要领养谁。

String.Source: Hey, I got you something. Hope you like it!
String.Dest: 嘿，我给您准备了东西！希望您喜欢！

String.Source: When you've actually got the coin, we can do business.
String.Dest: 等你有钱了咱们再谈生意吧。

String.Source: My pa died, and... and now I'm all alone.
String.Dest: 我爸死了，现在……我成了孤儿。

String.Source: Ah. Unfortunately, I'm afraid you're a bit short of funds at the moment.
String.Dest: 啊。不太巧，恐怕咱们的资金有些不足。

String.Source: No one bought any flowers again today. I... I don't know what to do.
String.Dest: 今天又没有人买花。我……我该怎么办。

String.Source: What? If you aren't going to be...
He... died a few days later. I've tried to make do since then, but... it's been hard. Real hard.
String.Dest: 他……几天后就去世了。从那之后我就试着凑合过，但……太难了。真的很难。

String.Source: Yea! Thanks, mister- um, Papa! I promise, I'll be the best daughter ever!
String.Dest: 耶！谢谢先，呃，爸爸！我保证，我会是您最好的女儿！

String.Source: ...wait. Shor, you're serious! Well, I... all right then.
String.Dest: ……等等。舒尔在上，你是认真的！嗯……好吧。

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of the Pale. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为苍原武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: ...Look, let's be realistic. You're an adventurer. It's not exactly a safe or reliable profession.
String.Dest: ……那个，那我们就坦诚说吧。冒险家不是个安全可靠的职业。

String.Source: I grant you a personal Housecarl, and this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我会授予你一名私人侍卫，并从我的军械库中取出这把武器作为你的贵族身份象征。

String.Source: Of course. What are we running short of?
String.Dest: 当然可以。我们还缺什么吗？

String.Source: Where will your child be living?
Oh, fine, if you want to bring up little pickpockets. This place is a terrible influence on a child.
String.Dest: 哦，好吧，如果你说的是那些小贼的事。这地方对孩子的影响太不好了。

String.Source: Why... why did you do that?
String.Dest: 为什么……为什么你要这么做？

String.Source: I will remain on guard here.
Is... is that your pet? Really? Wow, he looks tough!
String.Dest: 那是……您的宠物吗？真的吗？喔，他看着好强壮！

String.Source: Hmph. Suit yourself. I can't promise someone else won't buy it in the meantime, though.
String.Dest: 嗯。随你的便吧。但我不能保证在此期间不会有人买下。

String.Source: As you command, Thane. I'll wait at the White Hall in Dawnstar until you need me again.
String.Dest: 遵命，武卫。我会在晨星的白色会堂等您再次召我。

String.Source: My parents dropped me off here a year ago. But they're coming back to get me. They said so.
String.Dest: 我父母一年前把我送到这里。但他们会来接我的。他们说了。

String.Source: I... I know it's not much, but... I've found a few little things. I've put them in the chest in my room.
String.Dest: 我……我知道这不算什么，但……我找到些小玩意儿。我把它们都放在我房间的箱子里了。

String.Source: It's in the south of the Pale, near Giants' Gap. Just the spot for someone like you to establish a steading.
String.Dest: 这片地位于苍原领的南部，巨人峡谷附近。是你这样的人安家的好地方。

String.Source: I... I have a home again. A family. I almost can't believe it.
String.Dest: 我……我又有家了。真不敢相信。

String.Source: This is more than I ever could have hoped for. Thanks. Thanks so much.
String.Dest: 这比我期望的还要多。谢谢。非常感谢。

String.Source: I have a family again. I... I can't thank you enough.
String.Dest: 我又有了一个家。我……我真的很感激您。

String.Source: I'd... I'd really like a dolly. Or maybe a pretty new dress?
String.Dest: 我……我很想要个娃娃。或者一件新裙子？
谢谢您。谢谢……您做的一切。

String.Source: It's a fine property. Well-watered, plentiful stands of timber, beautiful view.
String.Dest: 这是个很不错的地点。水源充足、树木茂盛，而且景色优美。

String.Source: Well, sweets are always good. Or a new outfit. Or... or maybe a wooden sword? All my friends have swords.
String.Dest: 嗯，如果有甜点就不错。或者新衣服。或者……也许是木剑？我的朋友们都有剑了。
我听从您的命令，武卫大人。

String.Source: The cut they were giving me was good at first, but now it's time to clean things up. Go and take care of it.
String.Dest: 他们一开始分我的还不错，但现在到了该清理的时候了。去把他们料理了。

String.Source: Is it time to move out?
It's on the north coast of Hjaalmarch, with a magnificent view of Solitude on its crag. Just the place for a new manor house.
String.Dest: 这块地位于希雅陲北面的海岸边，可以看到悬崖上面独孤城的壮丽景色。是个建庄园的好地方。

String.Source: I'll never speak to you again!
String.Dest: 我再也不想和你说话了！
谢谢。谢谢……您做的一切，爸。
好极了。带路吧，武卫大人。

String.Source: Yes, my Thane? Do you need something?
String.Dest: 武卫大人？您有什么事吗？

String.Source: A doggy! Papa, I didn't know you had a doggy! He's so cute...
String.Dest: 狗狗！爸爸，我都不知道您有狗狗！好可爱……

String.Source: This is... this is great! It's everything I could have asked for!
String.Dest: 真是……太棒了！这里有我想要的一切！

String.Source: Ah, everybody around here's so serious.
String.Dest: 啊，这里每个人都那么严肃。

String.Source: Could I... could I keep him? Please?
String.Dest: 我……我能留下他吗？求您了。

String.Source: Are you... are you going to adopt one of us?
String.Dest: 你是……来领养我们中的谁吗？

String.Source: A dog! Wow, I didn't know you had a dog!
String.Dest: 是狗！喔，我都不知道您养了狗！

String.Source: My blade is yours to command, Thane.
String.Dest: 我的剑听候你的命令，武卫。

String.Source: Well, you smell like a Hagraven. And you look like one, too!
String.Dest: 哼，你闻起来像个乌鸦鬼婆。长得也很像！

String.Source: I hereby grant you permission to purchase property in Falkreath hold. Talk to my steward if you're interested.
String.Dest: 我在此批准你在佛克瑞斯购置地产。如果你有兴趣，可以和我的总管谈谈。

String.Source: Ah, it's you. Yes, well, now we'll see if the stories about you are true.
String.Dest: 啊，是你啊。好吧，来让我们看看你的那些传闻是不是真的。

String.Source: Look, Papa! I made a new friend!
String.Dest: 看，爸爸！我找了个新朋友！

String.Source: A pet! Wow, I didn't know you had a pet!
String.Dest: 是宠物！喔，我都不知道您养了宠物！
我的东西就是您的东西，武卫大人。

String.Source: I'll keep watch at Lakeview Manor until you return, Thane. Good hunting.
String.Dest: 我在湖景庄园等您回来，武卫大人。祝你狩猎愉快。

String.Source: How can I serve you, my Thane?
String.Dest: 有什么需要效劳，武卫大人？

String.Source: Well... I heard there's a really nice tailor's in Solitude. And... and maybe the Khajiit sell dolls? They always have the best toys.
String.Dest: 嗯……我听说独孤城有家很好的裁缝店。还有……也许卡吉特的商队会卖娃娃？他们总是有最好玩的玩具。
我等候您的命令，武卫大人。

String.Source: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad.
String.Dest: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。

String.Source: Look, Mama! I have a new friend!
String.Dest: 看，妈妈！我找了个新朋友！

String.Source: For clothes... there's a tailor's shop in Solitude. I'm sure they'd have lots to choose from.
String.Dest: 衣服的话……独孤城有家裁缝店。他们那里应该有好多好多。

String.Source: Okay! You stand right there and count to 10... no peeking! Ready? ...Go!
String.Dest: 好！你站在那里数到10……不许偷看！准备好了吗？……开始！

String.Source: There's a group of bandits in my Hold that I... may have had a few discreet dealings with.
String.Dest: 我的领内有群强盗，我……可能和他们有些小交易。

String.Source: I'll return to Highmoon Hall in Morthal until you need me again, Thane.
String.Dest: 我会在莫萨尔的悬月大厅等您再次召我，武卫。

String.Source: I'll return to Windstad Manor and remain on guard, my Thane.
String.Dest: 那我就回风城庄园继续站岗，武卫大人。

String.Source: It's... it's everything I could have hoped for.
Ah, a letter from the Jarl! Moving up in the world, eh?
String.Dest: 啊，是领主送来的信！你正在往上爬啊？

String.Source: By the gods, a dragon's been sighted just south of the city, flying around Lost Tongue Overlook.
String.Dest: 神啊，城南发现了一条龙，飞过失语眺岩了。

String.Source: You know what? I like you. You're not afraid to get your hands dirty.
String.Dest: 你知道吗？我很中意你。你不怕弄脏自己的手。

String.Source: Hello friend. Make yourself at home.
String.Dest: 你好啊朋友。跟在自己家一样。

String.Source: Wonderful. I'll sleep better knowing you're watching the southern marches. Here's the title to your steading.
String.Dest: 太好了。知道你在南边住，我也能睡得安稳了。这是你的庄园所有凭证。

String.Source: If you see anything you want, take it. You've done so much for me... it's the least I can do.
String.Dest: 如果您看到有需要的东西，就拿去。您为我做的太多了……这是我最起码应该做的。
你……你给我把那话收回去！

String.Source: You have quite a house. I'm thinking of setting up a small store here. Sell odds and ends.
String.Dest: 你的房子真好啊。我打算在这里开家商店。卖些零碎东西。

String.Source: I... I know it's not much, but... I've found a few pretty things. They're in the chest in my room.
String.Dest: 我……我知道这不算什么，但……我找到些漂亮的小玩意儿。都放在我房间的箱子里了。

String.Source: The cut they were giving me was good at first, but now it's time to clean things up. Go and take care of it.
String.Dest: 他们一开始分我的还不错，但现在到了该清理的时候了。去把他们料理了。

String.Source: You came to visit! It's so much better here with Grelod gone. Thanks to you.
String.Dest: 你来了！自从桂罗死了这里好多了。谢谢你。

String.Source: Just follow the road south from Dawnstar, past Fort Dunstad, then head south.
String.Dest: 从晨星往南走，路过丹斯塔德堡，然后再往南。

String.Source: Yes, it is. It's in the southern part of the Pale, right on the border with Whiterun Hold. All the room in the world to build your own house.
String.Dest: 没错。这片地位于苍原领的南部，就在白漫领的边界上。有的是地方让你建房子。

String.Source: Sorry, no houses for sale in Dawnstar right now. But... I could sell you land in the hold where you could build your own house.
String.Dest: 抱歉，晨星没有现房了。但是……我可以卖给你一块领内的土地。

String.Source: Land? Ah, yes. The Heljarchen estate. I thought of you immediately when it became available.
String.Dest: 土地？啊，没错。赫雅根庄园。一有可售卖的地我就想到你了。

String.Source: That's unfortunate. Maybe I misjudged you.
String.Dest: 这可不巧了。也许是我高估你了。

String.Source: Do you... do you think I could keep him for you?
String.Dest: 您……您觉得我能留下他吗？

String.Source: Ma! Look what followed me home!
String.Dest: 妈！看有个什么东西和我回家了！

String.Source: All right. I do worry, though, no matter how many times the guards say Markarth is safe.
String.Dest: 还好。但不管卫兵说了多少次马卡斯很安全，我还是很担心。

String.Source: As you command, Thane. I'll guard Heljarchen House until you return.
String.Dest: 遵命，武卫大人。在你回来前，我都会看守赫雅根大宅的。

String.Source: Is... is that your pet, Papa? He looks really scary!
String.Dest: 那是……您的宠物吗，爸爸？他看起来好吓人！

String.Source: Don't be long. My place is by your side.
String.Dest: 请不要太久。我还是应该在您身边。

String.Source: Oh yeah? Well, I've seen mudcrabs that're smarter than you!
String.Dest: 哦，是吗？我见过的泥沼蟹都比你聪明！

String.Source: Pa! Look what followed me home!
String.Dest: 爸！看有个什么东西和我回家了！
谢谢。谢谢……您做的一切，妈。

String.Source: I'm sure the Khajiit would have one- their toys are the best!
String.Dest: 我觉得卡吉特那里应该有，他们的玩具可好了！

String.Source: Oh. For some reason I didn't realize you were the same person all the stories were about...
String.Dest: 哦。不好意思，一时没有认出你就是传闻中的那个……

String.Source: I'll wait for you at the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath until you need me again, Thane.
String.Dest: 我会在佛克瑞斯的领主长屋等您再次召我，武卫。

String.Source: Constance takes good care of us. But... I still want a real home. A real family.
String.Dest: 康斯坦斯把我们照顾得很好。但我……还是想要一个真正的家。一个真正的家庭。

String.Source: It's not too bad here. But... I still miss my parents.
String.Dest: 这里不算太糟。但……我还是会想念父母。

String.Source: I hate it here. I... I wanna go home.
String.Dest: 我讨厌这里。我……我想回家。

String.Source: A real home. A real family. I almost can't believe it.
String.Dest: 一个真正的家。一个真正的家庭。我简直不敢相信。

String.Source: Is... is that your pet, Mama? He looks really scary!
String.Dest: 那是……您的宠物吗，妈妈？他看起来好吓人！

String.Source: There's that group of bandits that need to be taught a lesson, remember?
String.Dest: 有一群强盗需要被教训一顿，忘了？

String.Source: Of course, Thane. How can I be of service?
String.Dest: 当然，武卫。有什么需要效劳的？

String.Source: Do you need something from me, Thane? Or can I carry something for you?
String.Dest: 有什么事吗，武卫？需要我帮您拿些东西吗？

String.Source: Lead on, Thane. My blade is always yours to command.
String.Dest: 带路吧，武卫。我的剑永远听候您的命令。
我在等待您的命令，武卫大人。

String.Source: A doggy! Mama, I didn't know you had a doggy! He's so cute...
String.Dest: 狗狗！妈妈，我都不知道您有狗狗！好可爱……

String.Source: Why's someone like you want to hang around a place like this?
String.Dest: 为什么你这样的人会来这里呢？

String.Source: Do you... do you think I could keep him?
String.Dest: 您……您觉得我能留下他吗？

String.Source: Well, in any case, you still need to kill those bandits, remember? Then we can discuss you buying property in Falkreath.
String.Dest: 无所谓，你还是要去杀了那些强盗，记得吗？然后咱们再来讨论你在佛克瑞斯买地的事。

String.Source: I'm yours to command, Thane. I'll wait here until you need me.
String.Dest: 遵命，武卫。我会在这里等待您的召唤。

String.Source: I'm eleven years old, and I could take you.
String.Dest: 我已经十一岁了，能够打败你了。

String.Source: Good. My place is by your side, Thane.
String.Dest: 好。我和您同在，武卫大人。

String.Source: The land is near Giants' Gap, right on the border with Whiterun Hold. You'll almost be in sight of the Loreius Farm, in fact.
String.Dest: 这块地在巨人峡谷附近，在和白漫领的交界上。事实上你都可以看到罗瑞尤斯农场了。

String.Source: If you see anything you like, please, take it! You've done so much for me. It's... it's the least I can do.
String.Dest: 如果您看到有需要的东西，就请拿去吧。您为我做的太多了……这是我最起码应该做的。

String.Source: Married. It doesn't feel like I thought it would, but I'm happy. Where should we live? You could stay with me....
String.Dest: 结婚了。和我想的不一样，但我很开心。我们该住哪里呢？你可以和我住一起……

String.Source: Ah, excellent! We'll just call this a misunderstanding between friends. I've already forgotten it, myself.
String.Dest: 啊，太好了！我们就当是朋友之间的误会吧。我已经忘了。

String.Source: I think you're looking for the chief.
You'd better be on your way now.
You're stupid. All we wanted was money! They're gonna cut her throat now!
String.Dest: 你这个傻子。我们只是想要钱！他们现在要割了她的喉咙了！

String.Source: You look like the type who'd rather let your girlfriend die than fork over some gold. And people think we're heartless monsters...
String.Dest: 你看着像是看自己女人死也不愿意花一分钱的人啊。人们都说我们才是无情的怪物……

String.Source: I'm glad to see you! Let's get out of here!
String.Dest: 见到你真高兴！我们快离开这里吧！

String.Source: Hello, my name is Oriella, the bard that you asked your steward to hire. I hope my music will be pleasing to you.
String.Dest: 您好，我是奥莉拉，您管家雇来的吟游诗人。希望我的音乐能够让您开心。

String.Source: I knew you'd come for me!
I knew you'd come for me!
Hold on. We didn't know it was you we were messing with. Look, we'll let him go and call it even, all right? No need for any more trouble.
String.Dest: 等下。我们不知道是惹上了您。这样，我们把他放了，算是扯平了好吗？您不必再麻烦了。

String.Source: It would be pleasant to have some music in the house. I'll make inquiries about retaining the services of a bard.
String.Dest: 家里要是能有些音乐确实不错。我会留心打听一下哪里有吟游诗人的。

String.Source: You gotta talk to the chief. Rochelle.
String.Dest: 你得跟我们头儿罗谢尔谈谈。

String.Source: Don't worry, she's on her way. Just be patient for a minute.
String.Dest: 别担心，她已经在路上了。耐心等一会儿。

String.Source: Grr... I'm gonna get you for that!
Well if you don't have any money, what are we standing here talking about?
String.Dest: 你要是没钱，那我们还废什么话？

String.Source: Good! I knew you couldn't have been serious when you dismissed me. Life without music is hardly worth living, is it?
String.Dest: 太好了！我就知道您要解雇我时不是认真的。没有音乐的生活毫无意义，难道不是吗？

String.Source: The chief wanted me to tell you... your girlfriend was real nice to us while you were gone.
String.Dest: 头儿让我告诉你……你妻子在你不在的时候对我们不错。

String.Source: Certainly. I am trained in the three traditional bardic instruments: lute, drum, and flute. Which would you prefer?
String.Dest: 当然。我学过三种传统吟游乐器，鲁特琴、鼓、长笛。您喜欢哪种？

String.Source: As you wish. We can consider this incident nothing more than an unfortunate misunderstanding.
String.Dest: 如您所愿。就当是个不凑巧的误会吧。

String.Source: Oh. Well then, I'd best be on my way.
Well if you don't have any money, what are we standing here talking about?
String.Dest: 你要是没钱，那我们还废什么话？

String.Source: Good day to you. I am Sonir, the bard that your steward has hired. Please let me know if there's anything specific you want to hear.
String.Dest: 祝您安好。我是索妮尔，是您管家雇来的吟游诗人。如果您有什么特别想听的，请随时告诉我。

String.Source: Allow me to introduce myself. I am the bard Llewellyn, known as "The Nightingale". Your steward has arranged for me to take service with you.
String.Dest: 请允许我自我介绍一下。我是吟游诗人卢埃林，人们都管我叫“夜莺”。您的管家安排我来为您服务。

String.Source: Stupid Lars Battle-Born. I fight him almost every day, but it's not much of a fight, 'cause he don't fight back.
String.Dest: 笨蛋拉斯·战狂。我天天都和他打，但那算不上战斗，因为他不还手。

String.Source: You're stupid. All we wanted was money! They're gonna cut his throat now!
String.Dest: 你这个傻子。我们只是想要钱！他们现在要割了他的喉咙了！

String.Source: Your wish is my command, as always.
String.Dest: 您之愿，我之命，一如既往。

String.Source: Well if you don't have any money, what are we standing here talking about?
String.Dest: 你要是没钱，那我们还废什么话？

String.Source: Hold on. We didn't know it was you we were messing with. Look, we'll let her go and call it even, all right? No need for any more trouble.
String.Dest: 等下。我们不知道是惹上了您。这样，我们把她放了，算是扯平了好吗？您不必再麻烦了。

String.Source: Have it your way. It isn't worth it. There are easier ways to make money.
String.Dest: 随你便吧。但没必要这样。有更简单的赚钱办法。

String.Source: I'm sorry to hear that. It was my honor to have you as a patron. Please let your steward know if you want to hire me again.
String.Dest: 真遗憾。能有您这样的雇主是我的荣幸。如果您还想雇佣我，请告知您的管家。

String.Source: I think there's something in the basement. I'm afraid to go down there.
String.Dest: 我觉得地窖里有东西。但我不敢下去。

String.Source: You're a connoisseur, indeed. Not many appreciate the subtle beauty of the flute.
String.Dest: 您可真是个行家。很少有人懂得长笛的微妙之美的。

String.Source: You won't enter this house while I live!
String.Dest: 只要我活着，你就别想进这房子！

String.Source: Don't worry, we're not monsters. She's fine. We get the money, you get the girl. Everybody wins, right?
String.Dest: 别担心，毕竟我们也不是怪物。她没事。我们拿钱，你拿你女人。这就叫双赢吧？

String.Source: You don't get a second chance with me.
I'll try to hold them off!
You look like the type who'd rather let your boyfriend die than fork over some gold. And people think we're heartless monsters...
String.Dest: 你看着像是看自己男人死也不愿意花一分钱的人啊。人们都说我们才是无情的怪物……

String.Source: Yes? Did you change your mind?
Sit back and enjoy some classical drumming.
String.Dest: 请坐，享受些经典的鼓乐吧。

String.Source: Relax, hero... he's fine. At least he was. The chief liked him so much, she took him back home. Here's a letter for you.
String.Dest: 轻松点，大英雄……他没事。至少现在还没事。我们头儿挺喜欢他的，就带他回家了。这里有你的一封信。

String.Source: Relax, hero. She's fine. At least she was. The chief liked her so much, she took her back home. Here's a letter for you.
String.Dest: 轻松点，大英雄。她没事。至少现在还没事。我们头儿挺喜欢她的，就带她回家了。这里有你的一封信。

String.Source: I can't wait to get back home.
You don't want to be bothering me.
Don't worry, we're not monsters. He's fine. We get the money, you get the guy. Everybody wins, right?
String.Dest: 别担心，毕竟我们也不是怪物。他没事。我们拿钱，你拿你男人。这就叫双赢吧？

String.Source: Don't worry, he's on his way. Just be patient for a minute.
String.Dest: 别担心，他已经在路上了。耐心等一会儿。

String.Source: Maybe you want to read this first.
String.Dest: 也许你应该先读读这个。

String.Source: The most elegant of instruments. The pinnacle of the bardic art.
String.Dest: 最优雅的乐器。吟游诗人艺术的巅峰。

String.Source: The chief wanted me to tell you... your boyfriend was real nice to us while you were gone.
String.Dest: 头儿让我告诉你……你丈夫在你不在的时候对我们不错。

String.Source: Could you take a look in the basement? I've been hearing strange noises down there lately.
String.Dest: 你能去地下室看看吗？我最近一直听到下面有奇怪的声音。

String.Source: Is that how you want to play it, huh? That's fine with me.
String.Dest: 你想玩这套，哈？我是都可以啊。

String.Source: I just want to get out of here!
Well, well. You're a lot smarter than I expected. I hope you brought the gold.
String.Dest: 好，好。你比我想的聪明点。希望你带钱来了。

String.Source: Really? You mean it? Wow, thanks, Pa! I promise, I won't be any trouble at all!
String.Dest: 真的？你是认真的？哇，谢谢你，爸！我保证，我一定不会惹麻烦的！

String.Source: Really? You mean it? Wow, thanks, Ma! I promise, I won't be any trouble at all!
String.Dest: 真的？你是认真的？哇，谢谢你，妈！我保证，我一定不会惹麻烦的！

String.Source: No, I'm sorry. But there is land, available to you for purchase.
String.Dest: 不，很抱歉。但还是有土地可供购买的。

String.Source: Oh yes, of course. It's available to you for purchase.
Hm. Well, if you change your mind, come see me again.
String.Dest: 嗯，好吧，如果你改主意，再来找我吧。

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I grant you a title to the land.
String.Dest: 那以领主的名义，我授予你这片土地的所有凭证。
那就别浪费我的时间了。

String.Source: Of course. It's available, if you want to buy it.
String.Dest: 当然可以。如果你想买，就可以买得到。

String.Source: Let me know if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 如果你改主意了，随时告诉我。
那就别浪费我的时间了。

String.Source: Excellent. Then I grant you a title to the land.
String.Dest: 太好了。那我就给你这块地的所有凭证吧。

String.Source: No, I'm afraid not. But there is land if you want to buy it.
String.Dest: 恐怕不太行。但如果你想买地皮的话，还是可以的。

String.Source: Hey! I know. The Jarl's wizard could teach ya. He's lots closer.
String.Dest: 嘿！我知道。领主的宫廷巫师也能教你。他就在附近。

String.Source: If that's what you want. I'll see you there, soon.
String.Dest: 如果这是你的想法，那我们就那地方见吧。

String.Source: The two of us, living together. I'll see you at home!
String.Dest: 我们俩一起住。那家里见！

String.Source: I can't believe my mother's gone. Now what'll I do?
String.Dest: 真不敢相信我妈妈走了。我现在该怎么办？

String.Source: I'm really afraid of Grelod. When Aventus escaped, she was so mad. I got double the beatings that day.
String.Dest: 我真的很怕桂罗。阿文图斯逃跑的时候，她很生气。我那天挨的打比平常多两倍。

String.Source: You'd better give me five septims right now, or I'm going to bloody your nose...
String.Dest: 你最好现在就给我五个塞普汀，不然就让你鼻子流血哦……

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Hjaalmarch. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为希雅陲武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: You really shouldn't be in here.
Five, four, three, two, one... go!
Papa may have wanted a son, but he got me. He's a lucky man.
String.Dest: 爸爸也许想要个儿子，但他有了我。他很幸运。

String.Source: Father says I don't have the knack for reading, but mama says I won't need it to work the farm.
String.Dest: 爸爸说我没掌握阅读的诀窍，但妈妈说在农场工作不需要读书。

String.Source: I guess we have our entire lives together, now. Where should we live? You could stay with me....
String.Dest: 看来我们这一辈子都要永远在一起了。我们到哪里去住？你可以和我在一起……

String.Source: My papa says I'm greg-gare-ree-yus, just like him! He says it means "smart," but my brother says he's wrong.
String.Dest: 我爸爸说我就像他一样“格雷格-格里-瑞-尤斯”，但我哥哥说他错了。

String.Source: When I grow up, I'm going to be an assassin. That way I can help lots of children, just like you.
String.Dest: 等我长大了，我也要当刺客。这样我就能像你一样去帮很多孩子了。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: What're you lookin' at? I'm not afraid of you, ya know. Even if you are my elder.
String.Dest: 你看什么？告诉你，我不怕你。就算你是我长辈也没用。

String.Source: If you can get Braith to leave me alone, I'll be your best friend... forever! I'll pay you, too! My whole life's savings - two septims!
String.Dest: 如果你能让布赖斯离我远点，我就是你最好的朋友……永远永远！我会给你钱的！我一生攒下来的所有积蓄都给你，两个塞普汀！

String.Source: My mother taught me the millwork trade... you know, which trees to cut and which ones to pass up.
String.Dest: 我妈妈教我做木工……你知道，得分清楚哪些树该砍，哪些不该砍。

String.Source: Hiya! What's your name? Are you visiting? What do you do?
String.Dest: 你好！你叫什么？你在参观吗？你做什么呢？

String.Source: This is the happiest day of my life. Where should we live? My home is your home now, of course.
String.Dest: 这是我一生中最快乐的一天。我们该住在哪里呢？当然了，我家就是你家。

String.Source: It's a wonderful house, my love. If you don't mind, I'm going to start a small store. Something to do whenever you're on the road.
String.Dest: 这房子太棒了，亲爱的。如果你不介意，我打算在这儿开家小店。你冒险的时候我可以做点事。

String.Source: Mom says the Empire is mean, but I don't think they're that bad.
String.Dest: 妈妈说帝国人很刻薄，但我觉得他们没那么坏。

String.Source: This is the Old Hroldan Inn. Clean beds and strong drink.
String.Dest: 这里是古霍尔丹旅店。请享受干净的客房和烈酒。

String.Source: A good house. You chose well. I don't like sitting still, so I've decided to open a store. Buy and sell whatever is needed.
String.Dest: 好房子。你选的不错啊。我不喜欢天天坐着，所以我打算开家店买卖些东西吧。

String.Source: Some day I'm going to forge my own sword!
String.Dest: 总有一天我要锻造属于自己的剑！

String.Source: I've seen bigger houses, but it's yours, so I like it. Now, I think I need something to do if you're ever away, so I'll be opening a store.
String.Dest: 我看过更大的房子，但这是你的，所以我很喜欢。我想在你出门的时候找点事做，开一家店吧。

String.Source: Most days, I do all I can to stay away from my sister and my father. The beating's the same from either one.
String.Dest: 大多数时候，我都会尽量躲着我姐姐和爸爸。两个人打人的方式都一样。

String.Source: I know all the good spots! You don't stand a chance!
String.Dest: 所有藏人的好地方我都知道！你没机会的！

String.Source: I hope you're not here to start some trouble. I'll fight you if I have to.
String.Dest: 我希望你不是来找麻烦的。如果有必要，我会打你哦。

String.Source: Papa says I won't see Roggvir any more, but he wouldn't tell me why not.
String.Dest: 爸爸说我再也见不到罗吉维尔了，但他不肯告诉我为什么。

String.Source: Whoa! They killed Grelod! Ha ha ha ha ha!
String.Dest: 哇！他们杀了桂罗！哈哈哈哈哈哈！

String.Source: We're married. I guess we'll need to decide where we're living, won't we? You can always stay with me.
String.Dest: 我们结婚了。我想咱们应该决定一下住在哪里了对吧？你可以跟我一直住一起。

String.Source: Some day soon I'll stop being afraid. Jouane is teaching me magic. He says I'm real good.
String.Dest: 总有一天我不会再害怕。乔安内在教我魔法。他说我真的很棒。

String.Source: Married. It doesn't feel like I thought it would, but I'm happy. Where should we live? You could stay with me....
String.Dest: 结婚了。和我想的不一样，但我很开心。我们该住哪里呢？你可以和我住一起……

String.Source: I hate it here. Grelod the Kind is the meanest person in all of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我讨厌这里。慈祥的桂罗是全天际最刻薄的人。

String.Source: Derkeethus used to take me diving way down deep in the river. I miss him.
String.Dest: 德吉图斯曾经带我去河里潜水。我好想他。

String.Source: Sondas takes care of me when mom's not around.
String.Dest: 妈妈不在的时候松达斯会照顾我。

String.Source: For a stranger, you're not so bad.
String.Dest: 作为一个陌生人，你还不错。

String.Source: Sissel thinks she's so special. No way she's more special than me.
String.Dest: 希塞尔觉得她很特别。她不可能比我更特别。

String.Source: Papa used to say I was greg-gare-ree-yus, just like him. I miss him...
String.Dest: 爸爸以前常说我像他一样“格雷格-格里-瑞-尤斯”。我很想他……

String.Source: Millwork sure is boring, but at least I don't have to work in a nasty mine.
String.Dest: 木工确实很无聊，但至少我不用在肮脏的矿井里工作。

String.Source: Why do they call it Left Hand Mine? Can the miners use their right hands too?
String.Dest: 他们为什么管这里叫左手矿场呢？矿工们不能用右手吗？

String.Source: We face the world together now. Where should we live? My home is yours.
String.Dest: 我们现在要一起面对世界了。我们到哪里住呢？来我家住也行哦。

String.Source: I... I don't have any money.
I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, Grelod has been so angry.
String.Dest: 我真希望妈妈和爸爸快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，桂罗一直很生气。

String.Source: It will be our little nest. I'll be waiting for you there.
String.Dest: 那里将会是我们的小窝。我会到那儿等你的。

String.Source: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again.
String.Dest: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。

String.Source: Grelod... murdered. Here. I... I need... air... You... you... Get out of here! Get out!
String.Dest: 桂罗……被杀了。就在这儿。我……我需要……呼吸些空气……你……你……离开！快离开！

String.Source: Figures. You elders are always so boring.
String.Dest: 好吧。你们大人都是这么无聊。

String.Source: I don't fight Lars no more, if that's what you're worried about.
String.Dest: 我不会再打拉斯了，你就别担心了。

String.Source: Papa says I'm too friendly with strangers, but you seem all right.
String.Dest: 爸爸说我对陌生人太友好了，但你看起来不错。

String.Source: We're united, but where should we live? My home is yours, of course.
String.Dest: 我们结为一对了，但我们该住哪儿呢？当然了，我家就是你家。

String.Source: I... I don't want to talk.
Aren't you a sight for sore eyes.
Hi! I've never seen you around here before. Are you a miner too?
String.Dest: 嗨！我没在这儿见过你。你也是矿工吗？

String.Source: Someday I'm going to kill a dragon all by myself.
String.Dest: 总有一天，我要自己杀头龙。

String.Source: I'll be waiting for you at home, then.
I'll see you at home, then. Don't keep me waiting!
String.Dest: 那咱们家里见。别让我等太久哦！

String.Source: A home for the two of us. I'll meet you there.
String.Dest: 我们彼此共同的家。我们那里见。

String.Source: Our new home. I'll see you there!
String.Dest: 我们的新家啊。我们那边见吧！

String.Source: All right. I'll see you there.
Changed the linens myself. They're fresh.
String.Dest: 都是我换的床单。很干净。

String.Source: I'm not afraid of anyone. Put a sword in my hand and I could defend this place if I had to!
String.Dest: 我谁也不怕。只要我手里有把剑，必要时我就能保护这里！

String.Source: I used to hate it here, but it's not so bad anymore. Constance is real good to us.
String.Dest: 我以前讨厌这里，但现在没那么糟了。康斯坦斯对我们很好。

String.Source: Pa says I'm too young to fight in the war, but I can still help by patrolling the town.
String.Dest: 爸爸说我太小了，不能去打仗，但我可以在镇上巡逻。

String.Source: Have you met Lucky? He's my pet goat, and he helps me patrol the town.
String.Dest: 你见过幸运吗？他是我的宠物山羊，他帮我在镇上巡逻。

String.Source: Papa doesn't like when I talk to customers, anyway.
String.Dest: 反正爸爸不喜欢我和顾客说话。

String.Source: Come back if you want to play tag.
String.Dest: 想玩捉人游戏要再来啊。

String.Source: Here. You deserve a reward for your service.
String.Dest: 给。你的服务值得这份奖赏。

String.Source: You stand right there and count to 10. No peeking. Ready? Okay go!
String.Dest: 您站在那里数到10。不许偷看。准备好了吗？好，开始！

String.Source: Five, four, three, two, one... go!
I'm strong, and quick, and can do any chore you want. Come on, adopt me. Please?
String.Dest: 我很强壮，也很敏捷，而且可以做你想做的任何家务。拜托，请收养我吧。好吗？

String.Source: You gotta have better things to do than talk to me all day...
String.Dest: 你肯定有比整天和我聊天更重要的事做……

String.Source: I was named after the sound a lion makes. You know: rrroooaaaarr! Really.
String.Dest: 我是用狮子的叫声命名的。你听：洛——阿！真的。

String.Source: Magic? That's dangerous. You want to learn that, go to that College in Winterhold. They teach that stuff there.
String.Dest: 魔法？那可是很危险的。你要想学，就去冬堡学院吧。他们在那儿教这东西。

String.Source: If there's nothing else, I really must ask you to leave.
String.Dest: 如果没有别的事，那我真得请你离开了。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: I grant you this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我要从我的军械库中把这把武器授予你作为你的身份象征。

String.Source: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
String.Dest: 我还会通知我的卫兵你拥有了新头衔。我可不想让他们把你当成普通老百姓。

String.Source: I grant you this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我要从我的军械库中把这把武器授予你作为你的身份象征。

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of the Pale. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为苍原武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: I grant you this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
String.Dest: 我要从我的军械库中把这把武器授予你作为你的身份象征。

String.Source: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Falkreath. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为佛克瑞斯武卫。恭喜。

String.Source: Grelod ain't going to like some stranger just hangin' around. Not that I care.
String.Dest: 桂罗不喜欢陌生人到处闲逛。但我不在乎。

String.Source: If you drink too much, you're out. No drunks.
String.Dest: 如果你喝多了，那就出去。这里没有醉鬼的地方。

String.Source: Don't have to tell me twice. But then, I'm not the one that buried iron under these mountains.
String.Dest: 别再这么说了。再说，把铁埋在山下面的又不是我。

String.Source: Please, mister. You got to get me out of here. Ever since Aventus left, Grelod's been even meaner than usual. I swear, she's going to kill one of us.
String.Dest: 拜托了，先生。你得把我带出去。自从阿文图斯走了，桂罗比以前更刻薄了。我发誓，我们会有人被她杀了的。

String.Source: Have you met Torom? He's the best dog in the Reach.
String.Dest: 你见过托罗姆吗？它是瑞驰最好的狗。

String.Source: Ten septims tomorrow, baby Battle-Born. Or I'm gonna bloody your nose and your lip.
String.Dest: 明天拿十个塞普汀，战狂小娃。不然我就把你鼻子和嘴唇都弄出血来。

String.Source: You're a guest. And father says we have to be polite to guests.
String.Dest: 你是客人吧。爸爸说要对客人有礼貌。

String.Source: This house is huge. I'll be tripping my feet all over this place. Hey, I think I'll start a little business here. Something to do, you know?
String.Dest: 这房子真够大的。我可以在这里好好活动了。嘿，我想在这里做点生意。总得找些事情做，你说呢？

String.Source: Yes. Braith bullies me all the time. All the elders think I'm a milk drinker 'cause I can't fight. Nobody understands.
String.Dest: 是，布赖斯一直欺负我。所有长辈都觉得我是个不会打架的懦夫。没人理解我。

String.Source: Ain't nothin' a boy can do that I can't do better.
String.Dest: 男孩子能做的事，我也能做。

String.Source: No! Please! I really don't have any money, Braith! I'll give you ten septims tomorrow. Just don't hit me.
String.Dest: 不！拜托！我真没钱了，布赖斯！明天我给你十个塞普汀。别打我。

String.Source: Assur and I are playing a game. Don't tell him where I am!
String.Dest: 阿苏尔和我在玩游戏。别告诉他我在哪儿！

String.Source: I wish I could be an adventurer like you, and go wherever I want.
String.Dest: 我希望能成为你这样的冒险家，去任何想去的地方。

String.Source: Come to get yourself a kid? You're out of luck. No way Grelod will let any of us get adopted. Especially not since Aventus took off.
String.Dest: 来收养孩子吗？你运气不好。桂罗不会让我们被收养的。尤其是阿文图斯跑了以后。

String.Source: Watch your tongue, stranger. We don't take backtalk in this inn.
String.Dest: 说话小心点，陌生人。我们旅店不欢迎顶嘴的。

String.Source: Kill one person, and you can solve so many problems. I wonder at the possibilities.
String.Dest: 杀个人，就能解决很多问题。我在想这种可能。

String.Source: Mother wants me to work at the mill. But I ain't nobody's slave.
String.Dest: 妈妈想让我去木材厂工作。但我不是任何人的奴隶。

String.Source: Hey. You wanna play a game?
It's just me and my mother at the mill here. My father is gone. We don't know what happened to him.
String.Dest: 这里只有我和我妈妈。我父亲离开了。我们不知道他发生了什么。

String.Source: I wish I was a soldier! They get to travel and stay up late and have fun!
String.Dest: 我希望我是个士兵！他们可以旅行，可以熬夜，而且很好玩！

String.Source: Teach them to stop paying me.
String.Dest: 告诉他们别再付我钱了。

String.Source: Boys, girls, dogs, elders - there's nobody I won't fight!
String.Dest: 男孩、女孩、狗狗、老头，没人我不敢打！

String.Source: Hope Pavo will be able to go back to his mine soon. Everyone needs a home.
String.Dest: 希望帕沃能尽快回到自己的矿场。每个人都该有个家。

String.Source: Are you a soldier? One day, I'm going to be a soldier!
String.Dest: 你是士兵吗？总有一天我也会去当兵的！

String.Source: Then I'll see you at home!
You've proven reliable. There's a group of bandits in my Hold that I... may have had a few discreet dealings with.
String.Dest: 你确实够可靠。我的领地上有群强盗，我……可能跟他们做了些谨慎的交易。

String.Source: Get me mad, and I'll prank ya. And not a little. A lot.
String.Dest: 让我生气，我就捉弄你。不止捉弄一下。很多的。

String.Source: Assur always wants to play "Hunt the Elf" and he makes me be the Elf.
String.Dest: 阿苏尔总是想玩“狩猎精灵”，然后让我去扮精灵。

String.Source: I am sworn to carry your burdens.
String.Dest: 我发誓要为你承担一切。

String.Source: Very well. I'll meet you there.
I will be back at your house if you need me, Thane.
String.Dest: 如果你需要我，我就在你家里等着，武卫大人。

String.Source: I knew it! I knew my father was a hero and he didn't just run away.
String.Dest: 我就知道！我爸爸是个英雄，他是不会逃跑的。

String.Source: There's a new museum opening up in Dawnstar. The owner is asking me to hand out invitations to travelers.
String.Dest: 晨星新开了一家博物馆。馆长让我给旅行者们发请帖。

String.Source: The Stormcloaks are named after Ulfric. He's a bad man, but don't tell the soldiers that.
String.Dest: 风暴斗篷们拿乌弗瑞克的名字来命名。他是个坏人，但别跟士兵们这么说。

String.Source: Mother says I shouldn't talk to people...
String.Dest: 妈妈说我不该和别人说话……

String.Source: My only concern is for the children. The poor darlings have no one else.
String.Dest: 我只关心孩子们。这些可怜的宝贝儿们没有别人了。

String.Source: I trust you're not planning any trouble. What can I do for you, friend?
String.Dest: 我想你不是打算找麻烦吧。有事吗，朋友？

String.Source: The cut they were giving me was good at first, but now it's time to clean things up. Go and take care of it.
String.Dest: 他们一开始分我的还不错，但现在到了该清理的时候了。去把他们料理了。

String.Source: This house of yours is wondrous, at least to these eyes. I've thought about starting a store. Something to do here when you're out.
String.Dest: 你的房子真是太棒了，至少我看起来不错。我想开家店。你出门的时候我可以做点什么。

String.Source: I'll get everything ready and meet you there.
String.Dest: 我会把一切东西收拾好，然后到那里找你。

String.Source: You look kind of scary. But nobody is scarier than old Grelod.
String.Dest: 你看起来有点吓人。但没人比老桂罗更可怕。

String.Source: Good to see you. Come on in.
Papa says I'm not ready for weapons. So I make lots of horseshoes and hobnails.
String.Dest: 爸爸说我还没准备好打造武器，所以我做了很多马蹄铁和钉子。

String.Source: You're new around here, so I'll go easy on ya. But don't get on my bad side.
String.Dest: 你是新来的，所以我会对你宽容点。但别惹到我。

String.Source: My friend Dorthe doesn't like my pranking. "You're being mean, Frodnar!" So what if I am?
String.Dest: 我朋友朵西不喜欢我搞恶作剧。“你太无聊了，弗洛德纳！”就算是又怎么样？

String.Source: There's not many people left in Winterhold, so I only have Assur to play with, and sometimes he's mean.
String.Dest: 冬堡剩下的人不多了，所以只有阿苏尔陪我玩，有时他很凶。

String.Source: When Aventus took off, when he said those things, about killing Grelod... I never imagined he was serious...
String.Dest: 阿文图斯离开时说的那些要杀死桂罗的话……我没想过他是认真的。

String.Source: Finally. I got stuff to do, ya know.
Strange house, but strong. Solid. I think I'll open a store. A task to tend to whenever you're away.
String.Dest: 奇怪的房子，但很坚固。够结实。我想开家小店。你出门的时候我也有事可做。

String.Source: I'm the older sister, by nearly five minutes. Sissel's barely worthy to walk in my shadow.
String.Dest: 我是姐姐，早了五分钟。希塞尔根本不配跟着我。

String.Source: Why is everyone so upset? If there's Forsworn, the Jarl will take care of them, right?
String.Dest: 为什么大家都这么难过？如果有弃誓者，那领主会去处理的吧？

String.Source: Things are much better now that Grelod is dead, but still. I'm sick of this place.
String.Dest: 桂罗死后这里好多了，但还是不行。我讨厌这个地方。

String.Source: I don't have anything to say.
My mother's dead, but I won't close the inn. I've hired Leontius to run things.
String.Dest: 我母亲死了，但我不会关店的。我雇了莱昂提尤斯来看管。

String.Source: Constance don't care much for strangers in the orphanage. Afraid someone might hurt one of us kids. Which, I gotta admit, is kind of nice.
String.Dest: 康斯坦斯不太在意孤儿院里的陌生人。但害怕有人会伤害我们这些孩子。我得承认，这样挺好的。

String.Source: Please, lady. You got to get me out of here. Ever since Aventus left, Grelod's been even meaner than usual. I swear, she's going to kill one of us.
String.Dest: 拜托了，女士。你得把我带出去。自从阿文图斯走了，桂罗比以前更刻薄了。我发誓，我们会有人被她杀了的。

String.Source: Are you new around here? You should go to the inn if you need a place to stay.
String.Dest: 你是新来的吗？如果需要住的地方，就去旅店吧。

String.Source: Mama doesn't think I'm girlish enough. But that's just stupid girl talk.
String.Dest: 妈妈觉得我不够女孩子气。但那只是女生的傻话。

String.Source: Assur says his pa says the College made lots of bad things happen, but the mages I've seen look nice.
String.Dest: 阿苏尔他爸说学院干了不少坏事，但我见过的法师人看上去都不错。

String.Source: Assur had to move away because of the Empire. But we get to stay.
String.Dest: 阿苏尔因为帝国的关系不得不离开。但我们可以留下来。

String.Source: Constance Michel says we have to be careful of people we don't know.
String.Dest: 康斯坦斯·米切尔说我们得小心陌生人。

String.Source: The mages don't let us go in the College. They said it's not safe in there.
String.Dest: 法师们不让我们进学院，他们说里面不安全。

String.Source: I can't believe it! Grelod is dead! She's really dead!
String.Dest: 真不敢相信！桂罗死了！她真的死了！

String.Source: Mama said I could help with the goats!
String.Dest: 妈妈说我可以帮忙照看山羊！

String.Source: What'cha doing in Left Hand? Do you dig up rocks too, like my mom?
String.Dest: 你在左手矿场干什么？你也是和我妈妈一样来挖矿的吗？

String.Source: If you beat up my sister Sissel, I won't tell.
String.Dest: 如果你打了我妹妹希塞尔，我不会说的。

String.Source: I had a dream that there was a good dragon. He was old and gray, but he wasn't scary.
String.Dest: 我做了一个梦，梦里有头善良的龙。他又老又灰，一点也不吓人。

String.Source: As you will, my Thane. I will protect you with my life.
String.Dest: 如你所愿，武卫大人。我会用生命保护你。

String.Source: I'll be right here. Be careful now!
String.Dest: 我就在这里。你自己小心！
